* * *
Peter,
**Mike Lindell is running for Governor.**
The MyPillow CEO and snake oil salesman is bringing his election-denying, con-manning, Trump-sycophantic self to this governor’s race.
Peter, we’ve seen what happens when we elect a crook to the highest office in America. We can’t let it happen here in Minnesota.
While I’m not going around Minnesota selling a — let’s be honest — below average pillow, I am selling the progress that we’ve made in my time as governor — like paid family and medical leave, free school lunches for our students, and tax breaks for working families.
**I want to be clear: Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota. He’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and we can be sure they’ll empty their pockets to support his campaign.**
**[Will you chip in $5 today to make sure we’re able to fight back against Mike Lindell?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251207.fkwWxk&amount=5&refcode=em20251207-247&t=22&akid=247%2E34582%2Eg_dl6X)**

Tim Walz

I want to be clear: Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota. He’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and we can be sure they’ll empty their pockets to support his campaign. I’m grateful, Tim Walz Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

body:
You may not have woken up and thought to yourself "I am going to contribute to Jon Ossoff today,"
#

**$5.**
That is the contribution Jon Ossoff is asking you to make to his reelection campaign before the most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign to date comes to a close.
If you know the importance of holding this seat and how hard Republicans will try to defeat us and are ready to make that donation right now, just use this link.
[**https://act.electjon.com/go/Ossoff-Deadline**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251207-1-f-b&t=1&akid=1224%2E5691347%2EJXNSuU)
Otherwise, you may not have woken up and thought to yourself "I am going to contribute to Jon Ossoff today," but here's why your donation is so important.
This campaign is heating up, and fast. Republicans are looking at the map and keep coming back to Georgia as their best chance to flip a seat this cycle.
And they know what we know: if they succeed, there is virtually no chance Democrats can take the Senate.
At the end of this deadline, we are legally required to report what we've raised. Everyone will be watching: the press, supporters, and most critically... our opponents.
A strong report with lots and lots of donations will hopefully make it clear that they should look elsewhere — that no matter what they throw at us, we have what it takes to win.
That is why we are looking for as many donations as we can get before the deadline ends. And because we receive more donations from email than anywhere else, we're asking:
[**If holding this Senate seat and reelecting Jon Ossoff is important to you, please donate today. Our average online contribution is around $30, but no donation is too small. It will all add up fast when everyone is chipping in.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251207-1-f-b&t=2&akid=1224%2E5691347%2EJXNSuU)

First, Democrat voters in Virginia REJECTED SANITY and EMBRACED VIOLENCE, sending a clear message that they’ll tolerate EXTREME POLICIES and DISTURBING VIOLENT MESSAGES from their candidates to BLOCK Trump’s America First agenda at ALL COSTS. Then, Gavin Newsom’s POWER GRAB in California has allowed the Democrats to STEAL up to FIVE SEATS from Republicans in the upcoming midterm elections. And finally, the crazy Democrats DOUBLED DOWN on their commitment to COMMUNISM and their EXTREME MARXIST IDEOLOGY by electing radical jihadi Zohran Mamdani New York City Mayor. | Peter, this is Congressman Andy Ogles. There’s no way to say this nicely: Republicans MUST step up to DEFEND AMERICA from the demented, violence-ridden, communist Democrat party from DESTROYING the rest of America. If the midterm elections were held today, there’s a serious risk we could LOSE our MAGA Majority in the House. Losing it would CRIPPLE the rest of President Trump’s term — and everything we’ve fought for could vanish without a trace. I believe I speak for every hard-working, patriotic American when I say this: I don’t want to see the party led by AOC, Zohran Mamdani, and Gavin Newsom calling the shots, and I definitely don’t want to see Hakeem Jeffries become Speaker of the House. I want to make sure every Republican incumbent holds their seat next November, and if we want to make that happen, I need your urgent support TODAY. Will you make a donation of $25 or more to DEFEND America from COMMUNISM? | Thank you for your unwavering support, Rep. Andy Ogles | PAID FOR BY ANDY OGLES FOR CONGRESS P.O.Box 68009, Franklin, TN, 37068

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Peter, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

name: The Democrats
subject: Our team just ran the numbers…
body:
---
Derek, In just a few weeks — for the last time this year — we will be required to report what we’ve raised this month. The truth is, _everyone_ will be watching that number. **There is nothing Donald Trump and his Republican cronies would like more than for Democrats to take our foot off the gas.** If we want to take back the House and Senate in 2026 and put a major check on Trump’s power, we cannot slow down even for a second. [**Our team just ran the numbers, and with our average online donation currently $28, we need about 52 people to chip in to this email to keep us on track. Can we count on your donation of $28 — or whatever you are able to give — to make the difference?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251207_5463_fr&amount=28&refcode2=5463_22930333_tubYI-&akid=5463%2E22930333%2EtubYI-) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[DONATE $28](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=28&refcode=em_20251207_5463_fr&refcode2=5463_22930333_tubYI-&akid=5463%2E22930333%2EtubYI-)**

name: Team Cooper for NC
subject: Quick Sunday read:
body:
This is why we need your help.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)
_Here’s what you already know, Peter:_ → North Carolina’s 2026 U.S. Senate race could be the KEY to deciding the Senate majority → National Republicans are coalescing around Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, D.C. lobbyist Michael Whatley → Trump has personally gone after Roy Cooper because Roy is seen as the top threat to the GOP’s Senate majority → Polling shows a tight race that could swing either way **[This is where things stand right now. But in a race this competitive, fortunes can turn on a dime. We are asking for your help today to put us in the strongest position tomorrow. Is there any amount you can give?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2243?t=7&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2244?t=8&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2245?t=9&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)

---

---
Thanks for being with us,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)

[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=121%2E124072%2EQVU6wT)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
Let’s show we have Ilhan’s back and we support immigrants. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWrFqKt638ofHWAkwvD2coH6aD6Ya9ZxUIvdyrLKmZ1H_Oz2DlFLoQG9nV26jO8clIkMw2opxOdvUJDTsYXN6jlxzaGXGS8r63gn5WyluDzp4wcniBUtTnSM6gbm3afwsZdg4KTRs1S8GYXwb92HOWH1gVJ5INc784ZwmddrwTGPUHw4YwXFnHaLGa4CrI3EbLsjPafLRve7QhJpoO5pg0tg/4m8/PU7mUonXRzeI6BOKGB_pGA/h0/h001.ZfQTUKtMFSv85OWvRpqx0nIShc893xXoGXBUIF0EXxo)

Friend, Did you see my email from yesterday about Trump’s latest attacks on my sister-in-service, Ilhan Omar? **He called Ilhan and other Somali-American immigrants “garbage,” putting targets on their backs.** Ilhan and I are among just a handful of Muslim members of Congress. She has experience as a refugee who became a U.S. citizen in her youth, and I’m the daughter of Palestinian immigrants. Our lived experiences compel us to fight for human rights and equity for all people of all backgrounds. Because of our identities and our bold progressive leadership, right-wing racists, xenophobes, and Islamophobes keep trying to tear us down. We’ve had to hire our own personal security as death threats against us increase. [**Will you stand with me and Ilhan, and against the demonization of our immigrant neighbors, by splitting a contribution between our re-election campaigns today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJsMwfOYiLwVQ31oQylWgEgB2izJ0vGNokVaLzT--7ubcMeSLxD5pyXmunYjkXkvDdhSaX1_iOs4WyPBeKLgCI0mim6y3Yj4Jm5doM7VpuM5ZFgJzPRcYNZdHMspvaNKhoAwXD6sGUkrRqX4Lkh3lfbEUQnO3GDviXxJYBInSsw6ViDqgtKHIJoz0wnVcmNwyTqubTEYl_P-5d3HSGlqBLQtrgkXYZQldhCZrAqNU0UrNszHcpHO38G6EUOqwp7tNvhVNyJvxInqs5RNeO-2k68Mg4Rn_5re_E1c_INASfJpTrD_ZG4f7yKptQoL61u3Np_gv-pVgOchF78M-rAvDYO6P166epVtGRlltZ3m3udZw/4m8/PU7mUonXRzeI6BOKGB_pGA/h1/h001.fwMvwjZWlHnUwpmIF4vtnkLTutrpx72hfqr0toAEiN0) | [SPLIT A DONATION NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJsMwfOYiLwVQ31oQylWgEgNQGJIjCPY76K6ZMWck_75ibveO3GktltI6WwDwJDAWPwt4j7jRJj2IeloT9Z-EmKMkqvpjotCAoErORQw-rOSKmt5cmoFHaTn9Ie-KAOQUuVpQJwjaqMxRnFxZScQdoMiUqKoAkM8OBayVREuTVEo8YcqfRH8X5S5oAxc_lVRVYFlbmr9BQpmTyZEGP-rdG2ZU75ficLLAJ1vG2Hkp5r1ZvnWJBOK_eClmz6NY9bYpHIgu4fkeBxsT1ziec-qiUtj2b8tQQIqIexH0pLf5TQN7cwiiG6g6XHV5iDpSxPvjgMV6jCZomRrH2HuKoQ04f86eUl2NrcvaQaRp953z4z0A/4m8/PU7mUonXRzeI6BOKGB_pGA/h2/h001.WFsSHAnzwlWV8U9e07n5JFAqDELWipQ3CawJWuMpzRE)

But we’re stronger when we stick together, which helps us stay focused on the fight for equity, dignity, and human rights for all people. We know that everyone has inherent worth and value by virtue of being human.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJsMwfOYiLwVQ31oQylWgEgAM33st8BN7GgslVtQ4_Da0cUiMsqHN0r1BnOnsQ9dvwW69qvpHtN3EREdOYCCNU2PCco_j0oOXL_FjFPjSkbH3CwtSAweIzaTwsm1iCB1tmoMdyw9KERI86VmMBopg4IAE8xO_-yx_-E0yOhK0lDCoStwu0BBBeSoRjoA9CEK5GNitQ9ZsxENccCYUoVZblsApoxYcFIx7Q9Ni-qy2DDCL1MqhTyXTV-Nx17J12m8kWCc0XfaKtLfzcdFesv5E5O-mmxxagDhgzcEsAw_8v6wKrAQp2SgvA64TOOQcN-KbZzcIu2B-kSRe_zZDjOQiEmGPGBXnmnUW6ZX-6xn7Iv-4/4m8/PU7mUonXRzeI6BOKGB_pGA/h11/h001.ww6lWhEPqYYy_-J6Cuc8AHDuUBOK3qSL9HfE1VYNoXQ)
Ilhan has consistently supported my legislation to end U.S. complicity in war crimes, stop U.S. support for Israel’s apartheid and genocide, take on billionaires and oligarchs, and save lives.
**And I’ve been proud to co-sponsor Ilhan’s policies like the**** _Neighbors Not Enemies Act_** , which would fully repeal a dangerous law that was used to imprison Japanese-Americans in World War II—a law that Trump is trying to weaponize to deport and imprison Americans.
Early in the pandemic, **Ilhan’s**** _MEALS_********_Act_****fed 30 million schoolchildren.** Together, we’re fighting for a country where we take care of our neighbors and everyone has what they need to thrive.
**Because of our bold progressive leadership and our marginalized identities, right-wing billionaires want to tear us down.**

clean_body: Let’s show we have Ilhan’s back and we support immigrants. | | | Friend, Did you see my email from yesterday about Trump’s latest attacks on my sister-in-service, Ilhan Omar? He called Ilhan and other Somali-American immigrants “garbage,” putting targets on their backs. Ilhan and I are among just a handful of Muslim members of Congress. She has experience as a refugee who became a U.S. citizen in her youth, and I’m the daughter of Palestinian immigrants. Our lived experiences compel us to fight for human rights and equity for all people of all backgrounds. Because of our identities and our bold progressive leadership, right-wing racists, xenophobes, and Islamophobes keep trying to tear us down. We’ve had to hire our own personal security as death threats against us increase. | Thank you so much. Please feel free to check out more from yesterday’s email below. This has put a target on the backs of Somali-American families, at the same time as Trump is sending federal immigration agents to target Somali immigrants in Ilhan’s state of Minnesota. Trump also recently told Ilhan to go back to Somalia, which she fled at 8 years old; she’s been a U.S. citizen for 25 years. His racist conspiracy theories about her have led to ongoing harassment and threats to her life. Right-wing hate has forced both Ilhan and me to hire our own security, and those costs are adding up. | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Why Rivals Ted Cruz And Cory Booker Are Teaming Up:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-S9v2kCJg)** "U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz and Cory Booker are definitely not two peas in a pod, judging by their records in Congress. The Texas Republican and New Jersey Democrat have nearly polar opposite voting records on issues like abortion rights, labor unions and gun rights. And just this summer, they traded nasty blows in a Senate committee hearing where they accused each other of lying. Yet on Tuesday, they were both on the same team, using a joint letter to push corporate America to** ** invest in the new "Trump Accounts" for babies. Congress has already pledged to seed the accounts..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Ernst, Cruz Introduce Bill To Recover Billions From Biden Boondoggle:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-ohj8gdCHDIUyumooq3Q)** "Republican Sens. Joni Ernst of Iowa and Ted Cruz of Texas introduced legislation on Friday to recover savings from former President Joe Biden's rural broadband initiative. The $42 billion Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) program has not started a single project since the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law (BIL) was signed in 2021 by Biden, drawing Ernst's attention in a November 2024 letter to former Republican presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy and Tesla CEO Elon Musk outlining up to $2 trillion in savings..." **[Ted Cruz Speaks Truth About Afghan Vetting And Triggers The Right People:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-2OJw0g2Jw2niMDYMwmw)** "With everything that's happened over the last two weeks in Afghanistan, including the death of at least 13 US soldiers at the hands of a suicide bomber, it's easy to forget that the challenges don't stop once the planes leave the ground. Right now, over 100,000 evacuees, almost all of them Afghans, have escaped the country. But who they all are and what to do with them are not questions easily answered. The Biden administration's plan is apparently to ship them all to the United States, leaving open the issue of just how we are vetting those who enter. To be sure..." **[Ted Cruz's Finest Hour:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-qnSiPm25hoDn0A)** "Senator Ted Cruz is trying to wake people up to what he sees as a growing crisis on the right. He has taken to saying that if he were to post "Good morning" on the social media platform X, within minutes he would be deluged by hundreds of blatantly antisemitic replies. It's not much of an exaggeration. On Veterans Day, like most elected officials, the Texas Republican posted a graphic with an accompanying note expressing gratitude for the brave service members who fought for our nation. The message was totally uncontroversial, but the replies would have fit in the letters section of _Der St urmer_. "To hell with you and the..." **[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._yR0lkliCdtGChDwJIJ4A)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-ICDgDy9UWqikFeA)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._apw0TTswESQ)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._XStUP_8rcowNdDg)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._GkV1MFvOhlv-3oYmYw)[Send Ted Cruz Support Right Now>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._OzZg5OYBsjoWwQ)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._KKaQgAig)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-Q)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._7o9Z_plWnOyVhrd-_Q)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-AEP1LNA)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We cannot back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| President Trump is trying to intimidate and silence anyone who speaks out against him.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5142%2E35263%2EM9M04-)
President Trump is trying to intimidate and silence anyone who speaks out against him. But folks, the only way to make bullies go away is to stand up to them. **We cannot back down.** Now more than ever it’s clear: we need leaders in the Senate who will fight back against this extreme agenda. That’s why I’m working to make life _better_ for Wisconsinites, not worse — and it’s why I’m supporting Democrats across the Senate map who will help flip the Senate blue. It won’t be easy, but luckily, this team knows how to win a tough battle. Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive elections in the nation — and last year, you helped me win my most competitive re-election battle yet. ****[Will you chip in to help us lay the groundwork for this important work today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5142%2E35263%2EM9M04-)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5142%2E35263%2EM9M04-)

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: Your December edition of the JanePAC Monthly is here! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Full of historic victories, meaningful conversations, and a birthday celebration you won't want to miss.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802020/587411407/1328794144?refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
---
You're reading the December edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** , and what a month it's been! November delivered historic victories for our climate champions across the country — proving that grassroots power can beat Big Oil's billions every single time. Let's dive in! 👇
* * *
**JANE IN THE NEWS** | **🏆 Jane Presents the Jane Fonda Humanitarian Award**
---
Jane took the stage at Women In Film's annual WIF Honors last month to present the _Jane Fonda Humanitarian Award_ to fellow actor Jamie Lee Curtis. The award, which bears Jane's name, honors entertainment leaders who exemplify compassion and activism in action.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802021/587411408/1822154278?refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
Before presenting the award, Jane delivered a powerful message about their shared values:
**_"What a different world it would be if humanitarianism and empathy metastasized, if there were a contagion of humanitarianism. Tonight we're not just honoring a brilliant actor, but a change maker, a lifesaver, a woman who understands that celebrity carries responsibilities and that using one's voice matters."_**
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802022/587411409/1822154278?refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
---
**🎙️ Living Without Regrets: Jane's Conversation with Michelle Obama**
---
As Jane approaches her 88th birthday, she joined former First Lady Michelle Obama's podcast **[_IMO: The Look_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802023/587411410/1607161250?t=2&refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)** for a powerful conversation about aging with intention and living life without regrets.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802024/587411411/1607161250?t=2&refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
Jane opened up about a pivotal realization at the age of 60 that transformed the last three decades: living intentionally to avoid regrets. That philosophy has guided her activism, shaped JanePAC's mission, and deepened her relationships. At almost 88, she feels more centered and complete than ever before.
[**WATCH THE FULL EPISODE →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120802025/587411412/1607161250?t=2&refcode=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZTFmY2RmLTg4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TJfdHghyKOPOhLHVklZVLKI4A4W421B5BIeX4VwNgPI=&emci=d70dda86-11d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=69e1fcdf-88d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**🎂 JANE'S 88TH BIRTHDAY ROAST & TOAST**
Speaking of Jane's birthday — we're throwing her a proper celebration, and you're invited!
On December 17th, Lily Tomlin and some of Jane's dearest friends are gathering virtually to roast and toast her for her 88th birthday. Expect embarrassing stories, heartfelt tributes, and reflections on a lifetime of raising hell for what's right.

**🏆 CELEBRATING NOVEMBER'S HISTORIC WINS**
November 4th was a referendum on Donald Trump's dirty fossil fuel agenda. Voters delivered a resounding message: we're done with politicians who put profits over people.
JanePAC-endorsed climate champions swept races across the country, with over 60 victories in 2025 alone, proving that grassroots power beats fossil fuel money every time:
✅ **In Virginia:** All 22 of our endorsed candidates won, flipping nine Republican-held House seats and electing Ghazala Hashmi as the state's first Muslim woman Lieutenant Governor.
✅ **In Pennsylvania:** Joe Khan became Bucks County's first Democratic DA since 1965, and we flipped Luzerne County Council from a 10-1 GOP supermajority in 2023 to a pro-environment majority in 2025.
✅ **In Georgia:** Alicia Johnson delivered Democrats' first statewide non-federal victory since 2006, flipping the Public Service Commission.
✅ **And on December 2nd:** Our endorsed climate champion, James Solomon, decisively defeated former Gov. McGreevey in New Jersey's biggest municipal race! This victory is a powerful bellwether for grassroots organizing, a clear rebuke to the political establishment, and a huge win for our planet.
**These victories belong to every person who chipped in, volunteered, and refused to give up on the future we're building together._Thank you._**

**📊 NECESSARY READING**
New research confirms what many Americans already know: Climate change is not only life-threatening. It’s expensive.
**“Climate Change Is Already Costing U.S. Households Up to $900 Per Year”** – _Heatmap, 12/1/2025_
---
Economists at UCLA and MIT found that the climate crisis is costing U.S. households $400-$900 annually — driven by insurance premiums that jumped 33% in three years, wildfire smoke health costs, and extreme weather damage. _These costs hit low-income families hardest._
Meanwhile, Trump is dismantling the very regulations designed to protect our communities from pollution and extreme weather, essentially ensuring these costs will only climb higher.
Here’s the bottom line: Climate inaction has a price tag, and everyday people are paying it. That's why it's critical we continue to elect climate champions who understand the urgency of this crisis and will fight to protect everyday people from corporate polluters.

clean_body: Full of historic victories, meaningful conversations, and a birthday celebration you won't want to miss. | You're reading the December edition of The JanePAC Monthly , and what a month it's been! November delivered historic victories for our climate champions across the country — proving that grassroots power can beat Big Oil's billions every single time. Let's dive in! 👇 JANE IN THE NEWS | 🏆 Jane Presents the Jane Fonda Humanitarian Award Jane took the stage at Women In Film's annual WIF Honors last month to present the Jane Fonda Humanitarian Award to fellow actor Jamie Lee Curtis. The award, which bears Jane's name, honors entertainment leaders who exemplify compassion and activism in action. Before presenting the award, Jane delivered a powerful message about their shared values: "What a different world it would be if humanitarianism and empathy metastasized, if there were a contagion of humanitarianism. Tonight we're not just honoring a brilliant actor, but a change maker, a lifesaver, a woman who understands that celebrity carries responsibilities and that using one's voice matters." 🎙️ Living Without Regrets: Jane's Conversation with Michelle Obama As Jane approaches her 88th birthday, she joined former First Lady Michelle Obama's podcast for a powerful conversation about aging with intention and living life without regrets. Jane opened up about a pivotal realization at the age of 60 that transformed the last three decades: living intentionally to avoid regrets. That philosophy has guided her activism, shaped JanePAC's mission, and deepened her relationships. At almost 88, she feels more centered and complete than ever before. 🎂 JANE'S 88TH BIRTHDAY ROAST & TOAST Speaking of Jane's birthday — we're throwing her a proper celebration, and you're invited! On December 17th, Lily Tomlin and some of Jane's dearest friends are gathering virtually to roast and toast her for her 88th birthday. Expect embarrassing stories, heartfelt tributes, and reflections on a lifetime of raising hell for what's right. = Every ticket goes directly toward JanePAC's work to flip the House of Representatives on November 3, 2026. Plus, all ticket holders will receive the recipe for one of Jane's favorite holiday cocktails (or mocktails!) to enjoy during the event. = = 🏆 CELEBRATING NOVEMBER'S HISTORIC WINS November 4th was a referendum on Donald Trump's dirty fossil fuel agenda. Voters delivered a resounding message: we're done with politicians who put profits over people. JanePAC-endorsed climate champions swept races across the country, with over 60 victories in 2025 alone, proving that grassroots power beats fossil fuel money every time: ✅ In Virginia: All 22 of our endorsed candidates won, flipping nine Republican-held House seats and electing Ghazala Hashmi as the state's first Muslim woman Lieutenant Governor. ✅ In Pennsylvania: Joe Khan became Bucks County's first Democratic DA since 1965, and we flipped Luzerne County Council from a 10-1 GOP supermajority in 2023 to a pro-environment majority in 2025. ✅ In Georgia: Alicia Johnson delivered Democrats' first statewide non-federal victory since 2006, flipping the Public Service Commission. ✅ And on December 2nd: Our endorsed climate champion, James Solomon, decisively defeated former Gov. McGreevey in New Jersey's biggest municipal race! This victory is a powerful bellwether for grassroots organizing, a clear rebuke to the political establishment, and a huge win for our planet. These victories belong to every person who chipped in, volunteered, and refused to give up on the future we're building together.Thank you. 📊 NECESSARY READING New research confirms what many Americans already know: Climate change is not only life-threatening. It’s expensive. “Climate Change Is Already Costing U.S. Households Up to $900 Per Year” – Heatmap, 12/1/2025 Economists at UCLA and MIT found that the climate crisis is costing U.S. households $400-$900 annually — driven by insurance premiums that jumped 33% in three years, wildfire smoke health costs, and extreme weather damage. These costs hit low-income families hardest. Meanwhile, Trump is dismantling the very regulations designed to protect our communities from pollution and extreme weather, essentially ensuring these costs will only climb higher. Here’s the bottom line: Climate inaction has a price tag, and everyday people are paying it. That's why it's critical we continue to elect climate champions who understand the urgency of this crisis and will fight to protect everyday people from corporate polluters. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. – Team JanePAC = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

[ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=b7c9e78b7c48496fa437cb70b0ce35e6&_e=yQPuvZdnh2A-BVChs_VJtSvhW503nW6rwcboiOb6XhiigB5aWQZgxDyjMgqpLw5LM2o9S7D7scU2B7SOwFvnLvphE0NeTG-CvI05LjYOtEvMcWs0bXZ9c6jyABSYRjCN6R4YRCYaJItngR7yW8U2aee8cOw8Wu43r3iTlP6ohWquvT_H1hGb3VN4BVnMJNapZS1Ck3TzK1OIsplJ0UBprx5L4SpeQ62_Rv3aQ6qjF6IUM9nCS0a95AM8IE64YlIC0tJKGrRhKzQk5RLxsojL-JDJtCZi9yXoHpM0jVl6P0FwI5R7MmkTfQiMfKX-UAMhWU48M3O6spvZxgrRInjuLokmUdT9KoaqRauBYmfnnMFfy5n2l6RDcWm7J-uJDnssNhk9fI71Fqe9BZPDkScW9fGv9lXrF4QH9CC2YZRdeg3Uxd0Nx2DsgKkrby99Gk0gkUQb0xSVEjQctf6FUCUkaaU6X9JDM3aHDK6cunbQsMxLuJKMlVm6DEVE3Y0RUQbb2zI6Qf6WbgrjzvTwUQJ1GN2MvcTN0Hksmnh5TQSFHbeBAeBJE19Yfaz-wZpFGJmOLzQuOYI3iG8_i-UaEBBIRw%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

subject: Leave a Legacy with a DAF Gift
body:
DAF Deadline: 12/23
Dear Peter,

As you plan your year-end giving, I encourage you to **[use your donor-advised fund (DAF) to help fight back and protect reproductive freedom in the United States and around the world.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/120802667/587413606/2141984067?sourceid=1151027&utm_campaign=26emjge-1202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=daf&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAyN2I1Yi04Y2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4amKCOB-zsSvDJ1phhoNJsdqvdjA6hpFC2VSSy0lMpQ=&emci=71f57e41-0fd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=95027b5b-8cd3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)**

[**Your support today ensures we can continue this critical work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/120802668/587413607/2141984067?sourceid=1151027&utm_campaign=26emjge-1202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=daf&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAyN2I1Yi04Y2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4amKCOB-zsSvDJ1phhoNJsdqvdjA6hpFC2VSSy0lMpQ=&emci=71f57e41-0fd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=95027b5b-8cd3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

A donor advised fund (DAF) allows you to support organizations you care about while combining the most favorable charitable giving benefits and the flexibility to support the causes most important to you.

DAF contributions can take 4-6 days to be distributed, so we recommend making your gift to the Center before December 23. You can now [**give instantly using the new DAFpay button on our donation pages.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/120802669/587413608/2141984067?sourceid=1151027&utm_campaign=26emjge-1202aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=daf&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAyN2I1Yi04Y2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4amKCOB-zsSvDJ1phhoNJsdqvdjA6hpFC2VSSy0lMpQ=&emci=71f57e41-0fd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=95027b5b-8cd3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

Please know that your commitment to the Center's work means everything.

Sincerely,

Gabriella Morris
Chief Development Officer

P.S. You can also provide your fund manager with our Tax ID number (EIN 13-3669731) and our legally registered name (Center for Reproductive Rights). If you have any questions about DAF giving or other tax-advantageous ways to make an impact, please do not hesitate to reach out to us at [**contribute@reprorights.org**](mailto:contribute@reprorights.org).

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. We would like to emphasize that we do not offer tailored financial advice. This email does not serve as financial guidance, and you bear full responsibility for your investment decisions. Fееl frее tо cоntаct us tоll frее Dоmеstic/Intеrnаtiоnаl: +1 302 446 3628 Mоn–Fri, 9аm–5pm ЕT, оr еmаil us mailto:support@firstinvestmentupdates.com | | | | ---|---|--- 600 N Broad St Ste 5 PMB 1 Middletown, DE 19709 Іnception Media, LLC. Аll rights rеsеrvеd | "First Investment Updates"

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are under attack — again.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251207-1690-foote&t=1001&akid=1690%2E342411%2EcZpmK9 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are under attack — again. The past
few weeks have seen an alarming surge of racist, hateful, and terrifying
threats aimed not just at them, but at their families and the communities
they fight for every day.

This kind of rhetoric has no place in politics or anywhere for that
matter. It’s destructive and downright dangerous.

And while the words themselves are terrifying, the reality is even more
serious: the Squad has had to go above and beyond most elected officials,
hiring security and implementing safety protocols to protect themselves
and their loved ones.

These precautions are essential with the work of truth-telling and
justice-seeking, but they also pull resources away from the work we all
rely on: organizing communities, fighting back against the rise of
authoritarianism, and speaking truth to power every day.

Yet, despite the threats, the Squad refuses to be intimidated. They
continue to show up for the people, speaking out, organizing, and fighting
for justice, progressive change, and our democracy. They won’t let fear
stop them. And neither will we.

By supporting the Squad Victory Fund today, you can help ensure that
Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida can stay safe and keep fighting for
the issues that matter most to our communities.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251207-movement.GJOKjd&refcode=em20251207-1690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1690%2E342411%2EcZpmK9 ]Will you help protect our leaders while keeping them on the frontlines
where we need them most with a $3 contribution today?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251207-movement.GJOKjd&refcode=em20251207-1690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1690%2E342411%2EcZpmK9 ]Contribute ››

Hate may be loud, but together, our voices are louder.

The Squad Victory Fund

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

name: Powered by People
subject: We’re organizing in rural Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As the post-election analyses come in from 2025 campaigns across the
country, one thing could not be more clear: Democrats turned out to vote!

And it wasn’t just in the urban areas. In Virginia, the rural vote shifted
a whopping 12 percentage points in favor of Democrats. Similar trends are
popping up in other states too.

Competing in rural areas matters. And that’s especially true right here in
Texas where Republicans have been attacking rural communities for years.
They are defunding our public schools, closing rural hospitals, driving up
costs, and prioritizing right-wing billionaire interests over hard-working
Texans.

That’s why the work Powered by People is doing is so essential. We’re
holding events in every part of the state, registering and turning out
voters, recruiting candidates to step up and run, signing up volunteers,
and meeting people where they are. And we’re not doing it alone.

Our friends at Blue Horizon Texas PAC have been working tirelessly to help
recruit and support candidates in rural communities. They’ve stepped up by
assisting with dozens of candidate filing fees through their grant program
and by training hundreds of down-ballot candidates. We’re in this fight
with them as we build a coalition of partners who are doing the
on-the-ground work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251207-1-split.Cjw3op&refcode=ema20251207-240506&t=1002&akid=240506%2E444211%2EdtD88V ]Will you split a contribution between Powered by People and our friends
at Blue Horizon Texas PAC so we can continue organizing and competing in
rural Texas? Improving our margins in rural communities will be critical
to winning big races in 2026.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251207-1-split.Cjw3op&refcode=ema20251207-240506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240506%2E444211%2EdtD88V ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

Corporate PACs and national Republicans are already pouring money into this race, and I need your help to keep up. [**Will you please chip in $5 today?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251207_1_message._OR-Tq&refcode=em20251207-1&t=2&akid=3894%2E582294%2EIJaFJc)

The Senate majority runs through New Hampshire, and Republicans know it. Things are only getting more difficult as their hand-picked candidate John Sununu gears up to try to stop our grassroots team.

Peter,
---
I’m so angry right now that it’s hard to find the words...
---
**Under Kathy Hochul, New York has REFUSED to honor ICE detainers and RELEASED 6,947 _criminal_ _illegal_ _aliens_ back onto New York’s streets since January 20th! **
---
**The crimes of these aliens include:

\- 29 homicides
-2,509 assaults
-207 sexual predatory offenses
-199 burglaries
-305 robberies
-392 dangerous drugs offenses
-300 weapons offenses
**
---
When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are _KILLING_ New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported!
---
Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies.
---
But instead, they’ve doubled down.
---
Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as **“an artificial construction”.**
---
_...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway was**burned alive** by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December?

...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally **stabbed to death** by an illegal who never should have been in our country? _
---
I don’t say any of that to be graphic...
---
__I say it because no one else will__. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price.
---
And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned.
---
Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office.
---
_As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant._
---
There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch!
---

Under Kathy Hochul, New York has REFUSED to honor ICE detainers and RELEASED 6,947 criminal illegal aliens back onto New York’s streets since January 20th! The crimes of these aliens include: \- 29 homicides -2,509 assaults -207 sexual predatory offenses -199 burglaries -305 robberies -392 dangerous drugs offenses -300 weapons offenses When I say Kathy Hochul’s sanctuary state policies are KILLING New Yorkers, I’m not exaggerating: She’s turned our state into a dumping ground for violent criminals that should have been deported! Given the horrific crimes these illegals are committing, you might think Democrats would run from their embrace of violence and sanctuary policies. But instead, they’ve doubled down. Hochul’s endorsed mayor of New York – Communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani – even described violence as “an artificial construction”. ...Was the violence “artificial” when a sleeping woman riding the subway wasburned alive by an illegal alien in Hochul’s New York last December? ...Was the violence “artificial” when a veteran was recently brutally stabbed to death by an illegal who never should have been in our country? I don’t say any of that to be graphic... I say it because no one else will. I say it because while so-called Democrat “leaders” are busy dismissing even the idea of violence, REAL New Yorkers are paying the price. And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned. Their priorities are completely backwards – and it will END the second I take office. As the next Governor of New York, I will END the sanctuary madness on Day One, restore law and order, and work with federal authorities to deport every single criminal illegal migrant. There will be no more innocent victims of sanctuary state policies on my watch! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

The executive order that’s on Trump’s wish list this year would **allow big tech companies to continue testing potentially dangerous AI on people for enormous profits.** Trump also wants to task Attorney General Pam Bondi with establishing an AI Litigation Task Force to challenge and undermine state AI laws. **[_If you want to learn more about this executive order, I did a deep dive on TikTok! Go check it out!_](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/KqmBsG70K0MhhXg_xsUUyaa_C2FXKOHNqYtk6TEbDhe0mFPMfQGswSkgEZA6MeBaNIKim6AZDtp8QzBT9Efx0CL3ArCx9KNeb53e32jVwLU15aG1PRU9nK6RddLyaZ4Owlj7ppxpPnjGQVM25KxLZpYvbT_pz43Bl7ZxCWGD0LWl9rPhS_OqkrM0dxFwynKg-wfONd6HGmfnoHG4mcZuODpeXLbTjnIhVk7XHsFYSY3-0yabUfp8qTqGeIKxSAjgiYWHUvVvxjv1diGazYHonW8cQzMdoxJ_Cls13zNZ2VlEP9_k1fiK1-J7vw9UFeG1-mxyMm8ud7iN17RdE9WYE3AYdsy8XRIE2qhSFqvQvzN_6_BGMApT9AROBf52VwpvSEA3_-9Lukk8-PdBSvwmd1PCMQRcpy792nilylQW24L8a8E6bkUGHZmq-_qMXJle72pqNwZpP1VxfNAxzAxJJyYEs_IOTNVbFOR7xDRRtxFr20brEY6B/FtLerk-pFkats3pvf7-IgVf6FsHU0sle/15)** According to Trump, the biggest threats to national security aren’t China or Russia... it’s us, the state legislatures! The executive order draft may be put on hold for now, but this shows just how far Trump is willing to go and his complete disregard for regulations in place to protect us. As for me, well, I prefer to pass AI legislation that protects us. **That’s why I sponsored the first-in-the-nation bill to regulate artificial intelligence, ensuring ethical and responsible use of AI technologies and working to make this policy work better.** AI is constantly evolving, and that’s why we need to ensure protections are put in place to protect us. We shouldn’t punish state legislatures for doing their job. In fact, we need MORE elected officials who understand the importance of AI regulations and to stand up to the giant profiteering corporations. **[So join me in my race for State Treasurer, because I promise to always put Coloradans first when it comes to AI. Not “tech clean_body: Donald Trump wants Santa to bring him and his tech buddies protection so they can’t be bothered while playing with their new AI toys. | | | Peter, Donald Trump wants Santa to bring him and his tech buddies protection so they can’t be bothered while playing with their new AI toys. The executive order that’s on Trump’s wish list this year would allow big tech companies to continue testing potentially dangerous AI on people for enormous profits. Trump also wants to task Attorney General Pam Bondi with establishing an AI Litigation Task Force to challenge and undermine state AI laws. According to Trump, the biggest threats to national security aren’t China or Russia... it’s us, the state legislatures! The executive order draft may be put on hold for now, but this shows just how far Trump is willing to go and his complete disregard for regulations in place to protect us. As for me, well, I prefer to pass AI legislation that protects us. That’s why I sponsored the first-in-the-nation bill to regulate artificial intelligence, ensuring ethical and responsible use of AI technologies and working to make this policy work better. AI is constantly evolving, and that’s why we need to ensure protections are put in place to protect us. We shouldn’t punish state legislatures for doing their job. In fact, we need MORE elected officials who understand the importance of AI regulations and to stand up to the giant profiteering corporations. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **** ** ** ** ** ******************** **** —-Brianna T. Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. ****** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: A message from the new DGA Vice Chair (it’s me!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I’m honored to have been elected as the Vice Chair of the Democratic Governors Association. |
#
---
Hi team, I’ve got some exciting news, and I wanted to share it with you first: **Last night, I was elected Vice Chair of the Democratic Governors Association — the organization responsible for electing Democratic governors across the country.** I’m honored, and excited to hit the ground running. With Republicans in power in Washington, Democratic governors have never been more important. We’re the ones protecting fundamental freedoms in our states, standing up for working families, and blocking extremist policies from taking hold. **Looking ahead, there are 36 governor’s races in 2026,** including open seats in several Democratic-led states that we must defend — plus real pickup opportunities in places like Georgia and Nevada. **[The work we do together will determine whether we can elect more Democratic governors next year. If you’re with me, make a grassroots donation to Fight Like Hell PAC today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120805719/587425795/-790711647?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgyMGVlOGYtOTZkMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoNVTByVsvv-uld6naz2j0wxkymctkA6nSu_FEGGBWY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120805722/587425800/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgyMGVlOGYtOTZkMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoNVTByVsvv-uld6naz2j0wxkymctkA6nSu_FEGGBWY=)

name: =?utf-8?B?V2XigJlyZSB0aHJpbGxlZCB0byBzaGFyZSB0aGlzOiBbTmV3IERlbXNd?=
subject: Stephen Colbert speaks out to defend public broadcasting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
“It’s really critical that these stations continue”

| **We’re thrilled to share major progress in the fight to protect public broadcasting:**

Even as Trump ramps up efforts to silence journalists, public figures like Stephen Colbert are speaking out and stepping up to defend public broadcasting institutions. clean_body: A “chance” is not a victory | = | Hi there, A recent headline said it best: = Yes, Prop 50 passed. Yes, California voters protected fair maps so Donald Trump can’t gerrymander us into a rigged election. But here’s the part the headline leaves out: A “chance” is not a victory. We still have to flip the seats — or we lose the U.S. House. = = Prop 50 protected California from Trump’s election-rigging plot, but now it’s up to us to flip Congressional seats and win back the U.S. House. The next phase of work is starting right now. ➜ Expert forecasters now list multiple GOP seats as new tossups under the updated California map. ➜ If we flip even a handful, Mike Johnson loses his majority and Trump loses his firewall in the U.S. House. But Republicans are already flooding these districts with dark-money cash because they KNOW these new maps spell danger for them. We cannot afford to fall behind — not after California voters just handed us an opportunity that we may not see again. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- The California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. Team, Remember the 43-day government shutdown this fall — the longest in modern American history? Remember how Republicans refused to seat Adelita Grijalva, who won her special election in September but couldn't take office because she would have been the deciding vote on releasing the Epstein files? Once Grijalva finally took her seat and Republicans realized they'd lose the vote, Trump suddenly changed his tune on releasing the files. **And Republican candidates for Arizona governor? They fell in line immediately.** ✅ David Schweikert: supports releasing the files (after Trump said it was okay). ✅ Andy Biggs: supports releasing the files (after Trump said it was okay). ✅ Karrin Taylor Robson: supports releasing the files (after Trump said it was okay). Real profiles in courage, right? **_Here's what this really shows:_****Arizona Republicans care more about pleasing Trump than standing up against child sex trafficking.** [**If you want Arizona run by people who will put basic morality ahead of political self-interest, we need your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120806633/587429497/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM2ZjdkNjYtOTdkMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JUPGJs6QRv97UQF9oJresXasMJsfgpB_HTUgD7W86wc=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120806634/587429507/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251207_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM2ZjdkNjYtOTdkMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JUPGJs6QRv97UQF9oJresXasMJsfgpB_HTUgD7W86wc=)

We're building the infrastructure to defend key offices in 2026 and flip as many congressional seats as possible. That means organizing in all 15 counties, registering voters, and supporting candidates who won't bow to Trump on issues as fundamental as prosecuting child sex traffickers.
But that work takes resources.
Arizona Republicans just showed you they'll sacrifice anything — including justice for trafficking victims — if Trump tells them to.
We're making sure voters don't forget it.
Onward,
AZ Dems

body:
