| | | | **Petition ID: JV839 - Peter**

**Attempt 1: FAILED TO RESPOND**
**Attempt 2: FAILED TO RESPOND**

**Final Attempt: RESPONSE PENDING**

**FINAL CALL: [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMjA3X1BOLUlWLjExMDExN190MTc2NzgyMS0xMDQzJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTIwN19QTi1JVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc4MjEtMTA0MyJ9/VLAon3Jdh1TgbzwjRZYUVA)[Do you support enforcing Voter ID laws in all 50 states?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._0nWkTm5AQT7pJy7jOw)**

**\------**

_Peter, I've emailed you TWICE. And I know my team has sent you at least 3 texts about this!_

At the beginning of the year, I began collecting signatures on my petition to enforce voter ID laws in all 50 states. Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their names to protect our democracy.

But, if I don't receive another 18 signatures before 11:59 PM, I’m afraid we won't have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering schemes once and for all.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: They’re rigging the system. We’re building something better.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here’s what we do next:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251207-1&t=1&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)
Peter,
The Supreme Court just handed Texas Republicans _exactly_ what they wanted: permission to rig their districts and erase Black and Brown voters from power.
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251207_1_maps.3Po6za&refcode=em20251207-2911&amount=5&t=2&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)
Let’s call it what it is: **a green light for gerrymandering, a blatant attack on our democracy, and more proof that the GOP is desperate to cling to relevancy.**
They’re _not_ winning with better ideas. They’re _not_ winning with young candidates.
They’re winning because they’ve spent decades stacking the courts, suppressing the vote, and rigging the rules to protect their majorities — even when the people vote against them. We’re not going to try to out-cheat them. What we have to do is out-organize them. And that means building something better from the ground up.
**[Peter, can you contribute $5 or more right now to help us fight back?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251207_1_maps.3Po6za&refcode=em20251207-2911&amount=5&t=3&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251207_1_maps.3Po6za&amount=5&refcode=em20251207-2911&t=22&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)**
We’re up against a GOP that’s playing a 50-year chess game. And we’re catching up! This past Tuesday, we helped elect Akbar Ali, the youngest state legislator in the state of Georgia, taking the title from Bryce Berry, another LWD candidate.
We’re doing big things together — and it’s only possible because of your support.
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

PS - ALSO an important note: This case is NOT over. While these maps are approved for use in 2026 in Texas, whether they will hold up after 2026 remains to be seen. The Court issued a temporary stay, which basically means SCOTUS has paused a lower court’s decision that found the maps unlawful, while the case continues through the appeals process. It can be easy to feel like there is no hope but it’s important to know that this case is not over yet and we can’t give up.
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251207-1&t=23&refcode2=2911_587540__Xp4jF&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2911%2E587540%2E_Xp4jF)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Taylor
subject: We’ve seen this playbook before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Elon Musk is once again signaling that he’s ready to dump massive amounts of money into key races around the country, and we’d be naïve to think Wisconsin is off his radar.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251207-891&t=1&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)
We need to level with you about something serious.
**Elon Musk is once again signaling that he’s ready to dump massive amounts of money into key races around the country, and we’d be naïve to think Wisconsin is off his radar.**
We’ve seen this playbook before. In the most recent Wisconsin Supreme Court election, right-wing billionaires — including Elon Musk — poured over $50 million into Wisconsin’s judicial race.
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251207_1_ak.hGipts&amount=10&refcode=em20251207-891&t=3&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)
Grassroots supporters beat them back then... but there’s no guarantee we can do it again.
We’re up against an extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, who is backed by the same dark-money networks desperate to win power over our democracy.
**If Elon Musk and his dark money network decide to flood this race with cash, our only defense is us. That’s why we need you with us.**
[**Can you chip in $10 to help us stand up to Elon Musk and every right-wing group trying to take over our court?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251207_1_ak.hGipts&amount=10&refcode=em20251207-891&t=4&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251207_1_ak.hGipts&amount=10&refcode=em20251207-891&t=23&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)**
Thank you for taking action,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251207-891&t=24&refcode2=892_294397_4eK5Bq&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=892%2E294397%2E4eK5Bq)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

Marjorie Taylor Greene shocked the nation when she announced she'll resign from Congress on January 5, 2026. That resignation has triggered a special election in GA‐14. **And this district -- our district -- is suddenly on the brink of deciding more than just one seat. ****_It could determine who controls Congress. _**
I'm Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. **And I 'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years.** [**👉 Chip in here to help me win this special election **](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/y01c8gLgS9lPMLyo0ovIqA~~/AAPPABA~/S-C4-i99aZ0rX_qaRzPWS6kUKL-H41bIdGoQhbaAJOIGThjfi4PVndhr0_NTk0WAWdfjIF_TeivX0Qs6O5-6ew-lZkto7iiGPu-1rtlxYnrizp50oIpSTJN0_O_x6eqMXp09TC1-lrQO7OXgf_lONXXAdmQcBL2O5Wyr_w0tioTr1qBC5bD5F5Y0DTPUPIwiLZWxKwjXoHpNF3d7N0NAKHxaMIqjSIANPYqTyVaTsDPlMQQ2_ulAqAqf35vKaUkSSlv1wb59ETXUDR367f0oSg8QU3l5aXm-nRg4Dx5uSJhDIbHAdDf63IEzH6tguuct)

---
Make no mistake -- **MTG 's resignation is not the end of the chaos she created. ****_Not yet._** If Republicans hold this seat, they'll likely elect someone who carries on her legacy: Another extremist. Another conspiracy‐theorist. Another chaos candidate. Another vote for dangerous, divisive MAGA politics.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/y01c8gLgS9lPMLyo0ovIqA~~/AAPPABA~/S-C4-i99aZ0rX_qaRzPWS6kUKL-H41bIdGoQhbaAJOIGThjfi4PVndhr0_NTk0WAWdfjIF_TeivX0Qs6O5-6ew-lZkto7iiGPu-1rtlxYnrizp50oIpSTJN0_O_x6eqMXp09TC1-lrQO7OXgf_lONXXAdmQcBL2O5Wyr_w0tioTr1qBC5bD5F5Y0DTPUPIwiLZWxKwjXoHpNF3d7N0NAKHxaMIqjSIANPYqTyVaTsDPlMQQ2_ulAqAqf35vKaUkSSlv1wb59ETXUDR367f0oSg8QU3l5aXm-nRg4Dx5uSJhDIbHAdDf63IEzH6tguuct)
---
But we -- together -- have the opportunity to change that.**If we win GA‐14, we don 't just change one district. We send a signal to Congress that the era of chaos is over.** That's why I'm writing today: I need you with me, and I need you now. [**We are mobilizing a massive field program, building a digital operation, and organizing voter outreach -- but this special election moves fast, and we need resources immediately. If you can, rush in a donation of any amount today. Your gift will have an immediate impact.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/y01c8gLgS9lPMLyo0ovIqA~~/AAPPABA~/S-C4-i99aZ0rX_qaRzPWS6kUKL-H41bIdGoQhbaAJOIGThjfi4PVndhr0_NTk0WAWdfjIF_TeivX0Qs6O5-6ew-lZkto7iiGPu-1rtlxYnrizp50oIpSTJN0_O_x6eqMXp09TC1-lrQO7OXgf_lONXXAdmQcBL2O5Wyr_w0tioTr1qBC5bD5F5Y0DTPUPIwiLZWxKwjXoHpNF3d7N0NAKHxaMIqjSIANPYqTyVaTsDPlMQQ2_ulAqAqf35vKaUkSSlv1wb59ETXUDR367f0oSg8QU3l5aXm-nRg4Dx5uSJhDIbHAdDf63IEzH6tguuct)

clean_body: | | Marjorie Taylor Greene shocked the nation when she announced she'll resign from Congress on January 5, 2026. That resignation has triggered a special election in GA‐14. And this district -- our district -- is suddenly on the brink of deciding more than just one seat. It could determine who controls Congress. I'm Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. And I 'm running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it's been missing for years. | Make no mistake -- MTG 's resignation is not the end of the chaos she created. Not yet. If Republicans hold this seat, they'll likely elect someone who carries on her legacy: Another extremist. Another conspiracy‐theorist. Another chaos candidate. Another vote for dangerous, divisive MAGA politics. | But we -- together -- have the opportunity to change that.If we win GA‐14, we don 't just change one district. We send a signal to Congress that the era of chaos is over. That's why I'm writing today: I need you with me, and I need you now. ~~ ~~ ~~ Thank you for standing with me, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN HARRIS FOR CONGRESS

If you’re with me in that fight, please chip in $10 now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120808766/587436934/936185492?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_120725_HEALTHATTACK_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyMTNmMjgtYTJkMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TJQNrBeWPox5g03hW5x7ncWAa0F6-U0lg4geiR7eOqA=) The Trump administration’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” gutted Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the one percent — _leaving millions of Americans without healthcare._ The result? Fellow Conservative,

It’s hard to believe the incompetence in Minnesota right now.

While Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan are auditioning for jobs, Somali immigrants in my state are stealing money from **American taxpayers and likely funneling it to terrorists in Africa.**

I know this is nuanced, but things have gotten so out of control in Minnesota that the New York Times wrote an article titled **“How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch”**
**_

name: Colin Allred
subject: tough news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I won’t sugarcoat this

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1659?t=1&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
I won't sugarcoat this, friend:
Fundraising has been alarmingly slow these past couple of weeks. So much so that my team and I had to make the tough decision to lower our fundraising goal this month.
If we keep needing to cut goals like this one, we are going to be in danger of wasting an incredible opportunity to flip Texas blue – where not one, but four polls show me leading my likely Republican opponent, Ken Paxton. **[Will you help me make up this fundraising gap ASAP by chipping in a split donation of $10 or more right now between my campaign and Deb Haaland to reach our updated fundraising goal?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1660?t=2&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Deb Haaland will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1661?t=3&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1662?t=4&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1663?t=5&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1659?t=6&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
---
To be even more brutally honest with you, friend, I'm worried.
In a race as competitive as this one, especially in a state as big as Texas, resources play an outsized role in getting our ads on the air, helping me travel to every corner of the state, and fighting back against GOP attacks.
My MAGA opponent has already stockpiled **$20 million** , and Republicans are so scared of losing this seat that more dark money is pouring into Texas every day. And I don't take shady corporate PAC donations, which means **I'm 100% counting on grassroots donors like you.**
That's why I have to ask: **[Before it's too late, will you chip in a split donation of $10, $20, or anything at all to make sure we hit this revised fundraising goal so we can keep up our grassroots momentum and flip Texas blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1659?t=7&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)**
| | [Chip in now to flip Texas blue! >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1659?t=8&akid=6110%2E400544%2ES6_Rik)
---
Thanks so much,

Colin
|

name: Laura Gillen
subject: This is why December matters the most
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
If we fall behind now, we risk losing the ability to take back the House. It’s that simple.

| Peter,

Republicans are entering the end of the year with momentum, money, and a clear plan to flip the most competitive districts in the country, including this one.

And now my opponent from last cycle, the one I narrowly defeated by 2 points, is moving toward running again.

It would be easy to feel discouraged by the money, the attacks, and the pressure. **But I’ve been through tough fights before, and I’m preparing for this one too.**

Finishing 2025 strong is how we build the momentum we need to win in 2026. clean_body: If we fall behind now, we risk losing the ability to take back the House. It’s that simple. | Peter, Republicans are entering the end of the year with momentum, money, and a clear plan to flip the most competitive districts in the country, including this one. And now my opponent from last cycle, the one I narrowly defeated by 2 points, is moving toward running again. It would be easy to feel discouraged by the money, the attacks, and the pressure. But I’ve been through tough fights before, and I’m preparing for this one too. Finishing 2025 strong is how we build the momentum we need to win in 2026. = | = This is the only toss-up district in New York and one of the most competitive seats in the country. If we fall behind now, we risk losing the ability to take back the House. It’s that simple. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

Our first EOQ matters more than most.

name: James Talarico
subject: What can we do to persuade them?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**We have to convince people deciding between voting for a Democrat or staying on the couch.**
Peter -
When I was first elected to the state legislature in Texas, we flipped a Trump district no one thought was winnable. I was told it was impossible. I was told I was too young, and didn't have the political connections to win.
But my neighbors and I ran an aggressive, authentic, unorthodox campaign that brought people together, and on election night, we flipped that district.
Now in every race — this one included — there are swing voters that are choosing between Democrats and Republicans. We have to win a lot of those voters to win in Texas.
But the biggest group of swing voters is the people choosing between the Democratic Party and the couch.
Those voters don’t need to be persuaded on policy. They have to be persuaded of their own power -- that they have the ability to change this corrupt and broken political system.
Maybe you’ve felt that way before too. But the fact that you are reading this email — maybe donating and volunteering too — suggests to me you understand the power you have ... especially when combined with thousands and thousands of people who realize it as well.
That is what this race is going to take. People like you who recognize their power helping us to connect with people who need to be persuaded they have power too.
December is an FEC fundraising deadline month. So if you have been waiting for the perfect time to make your first contribution to our campaign, today is a great day to pitch in. That is why I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Texas? Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. But it all adds up fast when lots of people are chipping-in toward our shared goal of victory in Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251207-1-ak&t=1&akid=300%2E1347274%2En9gt4d)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: We have to convince people deciding between voting for a Democrat or staying on the couch. Peter - When I was first elected to the state legislature in Texas, we flipped a Trump district no one thought was winnable. I was told it was impossible. I was told I was too young, and didn't have the political connections to win. But my neighbors and I ran an aggressive, authentic, unorthodox campaign that brought people together, and on election night, we flipped that district. Now in every race — this one included — there are swing voters that are choosing between Democrats and Republicans. We have to win a lot of those voters to win in Texas. But the biggest group of swing voters is the people choosing between the Democratic Party and the couch. Those voters don’t need to be persuaded on policy. They have to be persuaded of their own power -- that they have the ability to change this corrupt and broken political system. Maybe you’ve felt that way before too. But the fact that you are reading this email — maybe donating and volunteering too — suggests to me you understand the power you have ... especially when combined with thousands and thousands of people who realize it as well. That is what this race is going to take. People like you who recognize their power helping us to connect with people who need to be persuaded they have power too. December is an FEC fundraising deadline month. So if you have been waiting for the perfect time to make your first contribution to our campaign, today is a great day to pitch in. That is why I am asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for helping us build power. James Talarico Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

body:
I know that at times it seems like our country is moving backwards, not forwards

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120809079/587438003/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDE5YWZhMC1hNmQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kIvsMEIYWaUQCCcDhdmyepGY6T4mt5vcTyzPRBr7lME=) Team, It’s hard to believe 2025 is almost over. But I can’t lie to you: I’m a bit relieved. We faced some tough losses as a country this year: Trump and his MAGA majority crawled back to power, thousands of federal workers lost their jobs, billions of dollars in healthcare funding were cut, and federal troops stormed into our cities without warrant. I know that at times it seems like our country is moving backwards, not forwards. _**But I’m still fighting for you.**_ That’s why I’ve hosted town halls and have met with constituents from all walks of life to hear about what’s on your mind during this challenging time, and bring your voice back to Washington. It’s also why I’m reaching out to you today: As 2025 comes to a close, I want to catch up with folks in your community and hear about the issues that matter to you most right now, and how I can stand up for you best in Congress. body:
This isn’t politics as usual. This is an authoritarian move to choke off the power of the grassroots. Chip in IMMEDIATELY - we need an overwhelming response to show we won't be intimidated by Trump and his rogue Department of Justice. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=120725_1]
Donald Trump has launched a full-scale attack on the backbone of our movement — it’s crucial that we respond IMMEDIATELY.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=120725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=120725_1]
In a chilling abuse of power, Trump signed an Executive Order instructing his Department of Justice to investigate and target ActBlue — the trusted platform used by millions of Democrats to donate to campaigns, causes, and candidates across the country.
This is not a hypothetical.
This is not symbolic.
This is the sitting president of the United States trying to shut down the Democratic Party’s ability to fund itself.
That’s not democracy — that’s authoritarianism.
We need to raise a massive wave of grassroots donations TODAY to defend ActBlue, defend our candidates, and defend democracy itself. 👉 Rush a donation right now to fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=120725_1]

Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: The one event Charlie loved most...
body:
I’ve never seen students more eager for this...| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f66540739e1e4cb997e37b08b844c047&_e=ye6ZbELjQTtRFTC5ud-b_WRJ0TNSYiwfNZe1XW1PXAfWDlmIwMZ3jK8eEnouoXJI6j5eFEKt4v8itpYJqsWf52YsncGTaBXH23Z_Y0cn0TrbEnWzHtvhgH4EHbfI1Rlzk8lKvgCxRAcYWBBu3wAe-T42pAY3ZZbr8EVj4tdXZTsmCYi4_oGY-kJqFmir8m1iJ7ecCV7LdX3840OXO13p2yaKGYL5Vp9rPGTfPM5UbniiYlKRer2iUfiNJ0K5BU0CmgwicycMuv8lfg84BykZa7nfhtYJ66XbaazQOZQQ7LdOAgQbX1ofgWpMNdtEgB2GgSLjgGiTau0Q1BnBILFc6IT86kJMIPB0ONhTFiPrRlbb7nFgyLI20X3verdEHggc55-pODjugsXUQpJsl-K5tOPDRlv2zpTHe3IraQShXWLzb_m0O293veoADKENYFegNrtS6ZtCNHtxPTvLJmcKGB7aNZGPpNnr4b5fYFzxGSJLygQIon-5M_m231fcm9w-g8O-SjyM6slFMi2NSvlBhbit72X_yibDgtE89gmer3-8bfQ3TGctXNNu6mhZHXPo6GM0_QCSipkR46QONL5MvWK1CNWPXsaoi4JSHm6x9p5TDNOlLz8B8NAzodgVpnt7Imjf0JBQU7GqmN9wYIMngyxBmXidC71hUQR1zk73gEP50jVs1ZmqpIlWJlKvI3M2)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f66540739e1e4cb997e37b08b844c047&_e=ye6ZbELjQTtRFTC5ud-b_WRJ0TNSYiwfNZe1XW1PXAfWDlmIwMZ3jK8eEnouoXJI6j5eFEKt4v8itpYJqsWf52YsncGTaBXH23Z_Y0cn0TrbEnWzHtvhgH4EHbfI1Rlzk8lKvgCxRAcYWBBu3wAe-T42pAY3ZZbr8EVj4tdXZTsmCYi4_oGY-kJqFmir8m1iJ7ecCV7LdX3840OXO13p2yaKGYL5Vp9rPGTfPM5UbnhdbTHLzFuE2sulOE0YJYKDVzr5qkPEdAzdgvoyTNwCRkMfK--AgvDQwS-FCd7jhTuNTQTis3amHnPfLMJtlq07F0kLFzSFaOYqL6hTPb6nMFG6R34WkQJgxEF7LwyXVJZMgdVcxkm_617JQVPSr8PvykHu0ttci0hBknyjsH7r2bhr7JG4YSpAq7SS6c6ht61nZm6DFX50UZKhCUacyetHrQgSfXtF3SqPwPfVnI4piWM3uJFJgAMDWJ8mrsOJctftnN8O7Th8dC_hXbsDI-4Jo3P3EgSfz91_ruj6K7T-8H9489GyVGw93sc3wD-Ys_bnLYh_sAjiCR8XJ9837TIhknCj3WbXMwbdn9lZUoJ62oBy3quWd4ozGp6qZ_M68CVED7CfKzKVH7I2DU-rV_j0cQLfEIGyPcn-k62KJXnhrZaOODtWqtVXxsjVYx-UTRAtHm1LKB6onToRxaFzKY2y)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f66540739e1e4cb997e37b08b844c047&_e=ye6ZbELjQTtRFTC5ud-b_WRJ0TNSYiwfNZe1XW1PXAfWDlmIwMZ3jK8eEnouoXJI6j5eFEKt4v8itpYJqsWf52YsncGTaBXH23Z_Y0cn0TrbEnWzHtvhgH4EHbfI1Rlzk8lKvgCxRAcYWBBu3wAe-T42pAY3ZZbr8EVj4tdXZTsmCYi4_oGY-kJqFmir8m1iJ7ecCV7LdX3840OXO13p2yaKGYL5Vp9rPGTfPM5UbniDdqrUQfVCzFlWwqO-sm7OJh0AgTfky3IfZeVVbAFd_A6VHR7O14SmJwK-2SHjglylnrJZzoz8knaWozcvHmUKO2Y4mr7GdzoT_Xt0uLPjX9Dg35w2wFW3USfX8BQp7DorGHnuGnN473zv0BZwlEz20c9aM7EQ_TS3FoDgErXZDtS4ysrvJJAP0JPH_nsj1l-fqAEyNW02WablsteEF0lYKByLJTJQ0EzAmLXuEPhsczKxLWNX-fnZ6cEC7Suel6xToeG-FUgduEswGUhWCbhONTY8x6ezFdjsoJDc-IR9Najs4bP6TkX-rK0yRvugJIKkYdq2DFlVoQZD171b_PA7YHeRFhz2dFjiFrbUkGMSMfSf48ZdbtlVU1YU2jtXpUSFbhdbx4VKhawyWJGufrLcekK1-554levmzi1qE83JZQQRvLGdbdXBBkCAXgFXV3Cn3ROtStHis4vcndmYTpS2)
---
This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Peter, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f66540739e1e4cb997e37b08b844c047&_e=ye6ZbELjQTtRFTC5ud-b_WRJ0TNSYiwfNZe1XW1PXAfWDlmIwMZ3jK8eEnouoXJI6j5eFEKt4v8itpYJqsWf52YsncGTaBXH23Z_Y0cn0TrbEnWzHtvhgH4EHbfI1Rlzk8lKvgCxRAcYWBBu3wAe-T42pAY3ZZbr8EVj4tdXZTsmCYi4_oGY-kJqFmir8m1iJ7ecCV7LdX3840OXO13p2yaKGYL5Vp9rPGTfPM5UbnhdbXC5mBs8yDlJyNhleavJlpkvTf3kiFZY3kV9eksQC08ccqPTMNCeIyecgYA3pCdjqyDWic0jGZ03mqG7q3uyy4jAFapnfhBisWtWDCFKljaFNDAuQQjv5HuU4krSH3CartkesFmSqCw-vzdwFESNhXRRvt44Nw5u6woONiHc1BxLTkD7_ZSeyzgttHLF9eweaka3kpU9S2-Ah_oM0cEHNDuzmL7_2FFrmhSs5KzznuWr1tafj8KpdTJNwUBbHgbBEN6LTpWnKtAAH9SNyzCFbMLGUplhEA1Qu5M9boccGU94L7ZiWkv6HI2CBvsPpRhNuS6r2jiiBbcWD1wgjNoDnjINrWM25PDWuOkcaWWIE5wquPhEt2bUfn2vMBof5PhY5PGJtxG_lA1mu3xKimzdfyTkW4GjzQLeUG5szH84UBqXyz3IlXNL-XrX1RpVSDynsjDhcqn4iOamP0G2SbXl)
---
They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

clean_body: I’ve never seen students more eager for this...| | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Peter, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. - Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Peter, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
A story I still carry with me

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120810447/587442667/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFmOTlkMy1hOWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNKT9TKPJJDFI6amlW-jPCE-s9VeQDanOBNQmtb2baw=) Howdy, it’s John. Before I tell you what’s on my mind, if you already know you want to help us finish the year strong, you can use this link here: | | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120810448/587442668/-431372808?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=email_120725_2beers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFmOTlkMy1hOWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNKT9TKPJJDFI6amlW-jPCE-s9VeQDanOBNQmtb2baw=)
---
Long before I ever walked into the world of politics, I was pouring my energy into Wynkoop Brewing Company, Colorado's first brewpub. _**Back in those early days, we offered pints for about $2.25 each.**_ It was a bargain even back then, but when you’re starting a small business, you’ve got to keep your prices as low as you can. The couple of bucks we got for each and every one of those pints was precious.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120810449/587442669/1931420983?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=email_120725_2beers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFmOTlkMy1hOWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNKT9TKPJJDFI6amlW-jPCE-s9VeQDanOBNQmtb2baw=)
But Wynkoop wasn’t just about serving beer. It was a place where people came together, sat across from folks they didn’t always know or agree with, and still managed to build relationships, to work out their differences. That spirit shaped how our team sees public service. You listen. You stay curious. You try to solve problems instead of making them worse.
**Washington could use a little more of that spirit right now.**
Instead of working together to lower costs, strengthen communities, or protect people’s freedoms, we’re seeing decisions that leave rural hospitals, veterans, and working families in constant anxiety. With so many important fights ahead, we need to make sure this grassroots team stays strong enough to keep pushing back.
That’s why I’m asking for your help today. [_**If you can spare the cost of two pints at Wynkoop — about five bucks back in the day — it would make a real difference for our campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120810450/587442670/1931420983?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=email_120725_2beers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFmOTlkMy1hOWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNKT9TKPJJDFI6amlW-jPCE-s9VeQDanOBNQmtb2baw=)
| [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120810451/587442671/1931420983?amounts=5%2C10%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=email_120725_2beers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFmOTlkMy1hOWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNKT9TKPJJDFI6amlW-jPCE-s9VeQDanOBNQmtb2baw=)
---
Every small donation keeps this movement growing, and it shows that regular people are the ones powering this work.
Thanks for reading this, and thanks for being part of this team.
Cheers,
John

name: Team Josh
subject: Jersey families will pay the price
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | If ACA tax credits expire, some hardworking Jersey families will have to **pay 175% more for health insurance.**

What does that mean? Kids, seniors, people with disabilities, and families will get tossed off insurance because they can’t afford it, impacting their health and stability.

This is unacceptable. People’s lives are at stake.

**That’s why Josh is calling for a bipartisan solution that truly protects our families.** He’s fighting for all of us because we need common ground to keep healthcare accessible.

**_[Now, we have to show Josh that we’ve got his back in this fight. # [Six Minutes Before Closing: The Day We Brought the Full Truth to Court](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=180980898&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTgwODk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjUxMzkxMDgsImV4cCI6MTc2NzczMTEwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iXMwiot92tcU8z1hML2q2CLHxm1WHYEFF-RaugUQntw)
### After decades of targeting and months of crisis, we delivered the most complete challenge yet to Zahid's unlawful detention.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Dec 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=180980898&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTgwODk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTEzOTEwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzY3NzMxMTA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iAYnCpY0E9QC9AV7Y_w54VVvNdKovzImXrfFFOe6B2s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWVsaXNzYTRjb25ncmVzcy9wL3NpeC1taW51dGVzLWJlZm9yZS1jbG9zaW5nLXRoZS1kYXk_.0tQEtmtCWF3_AUNJR2aIh3joQuOov5UbQ683pt25lJw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/six-minutes-before-closing-the-day?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I want to bring you directly into what the last 48 hours of the week looked like on our side of the glass.
On Friday afternoon--six minutes before the courthouse closed for the weekend--we filed what is now the most comprehensive, evidence-rich legal account of what the U.S. Government has done to my husband over the past 25 years. We delivered:
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bwUzoVqD3LkOa40FBZTiHAJgyBH85dYfgQuzT74QeAI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180980898)
* **25 pages[requesting emergency release](https://substack.com/redirect/66f26871-b066-452c-a556-7d9656e066cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **88 pages establishing the[unlawfulness of his detention](https://substack.com/redirect/2f6ae9b0-ac64-4d4a-9b2d-a93027e4609c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **211 pages of exhibits spanning a quarter century**

And yes--Pam Bondi has been served.
This isn't just another filing. This is a turning point.
It's the first time in a federal courtroom that every strand of this long injustice has been woven together in one document: the blindness risk, the disability violations, the unlawful targeting, the procedural abuses, the retaliation, the pattern that has held Zahid in a vise for decades. All of it--clearly, soberly, irrefutably laid out.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/958aa62b-492a-41e4-9d1b-db2fd76bdb66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For those following closely: after our initial medical-emergency filing on Nov. 24 - [the one The Stranger covered](https://substack.com/redirect/4d0333a2-8935-4cec-a678-677f04689fd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- the Judge required a procedural correction. We amended on Nov. 26, right before Thanksgiving. Then, on Dec. 1, we filed a **second amended motion** --this time expanding the scope dramatically - no longer are we arguing "he's going blind, let him go" \- it's now "he's going blind, AND he's been directly targeted for 25 years, and here are the receipts to prove it - _**let him go**_."
The government cannot any longer mischaracterize this as a mere "conditions" case - which would require "civil rights" process, not "habeas" process. "Civil rights" cases cannot result in immediate release - habeas can. Which is why it's critical that we are directly, unequivocally challenging **the legality of Zahid 's detention itself**.
Because it was a _second_ amendment, the Court's permission was required. We requested that on Monday, Dec. 1, and on Dec. 2, the Judge granted it--while also instructing us to compile everything within a single petition. Fair enough. That meant three straight days of reorganizing, reformatting, integrating, and strengthening every argument. Not glamorous work, but essential.
Also on Dec. 1, Zahid finally received Pam Bondi's Motion to Dismiss. We addressed and dismantled every piece of it within this filing.
What we handed the Court on Friday is _the authoritative record_ of what has happened to Zahid--factually, legally, historically. Someday, yes, it will be a book. For now, it is the fullest evidentiary and legal basis for his freedom.
The Judge has been responsive and grounded so far. He spent ten years in immigration law, representing detainees himself. He understands this terrain intimately. That matters.
Will we get a decision immediately? Realistically--given the length and density of what he must now review--probably not this week. But this _is_ an emergency case, and the Court knows that Zahid is going blind. So we could be surprised.
In the meantime, we fight on every front we have.
As I told our team chat earlier today:
"I'll take my satisfaction where I can. I hate this whole thing, but while we're in it, let's at least revel in the adrenaline of the fight."
Thank you for standing with us, praying for us, sharing this story, and refusing to let Zahid be buried quietly inside a system that counts on silence.
**We 're not silent. We're not done. And we are not backing down.**
**Give my husband back.**
--Melissa

_PS - If you 're at all inclined to chip in, please know that you are gratefully appreciated. Huge chunks of the GoFundMe went to early legal support, campaign infrastructure, and childcare - and along with paid subscribers on Substack (thank you!) it's currently the only source of income for me and the kids. We're extremely fortunate to be able to keep going -- but this work is all-consuming, and your generosity and solidarity means the world. Thank you._

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I’ll be ready to hold the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
It’s time to put power back in the hands of working people.
| Hi there, I’m running to be the next governor of Wisconsin because our state deserves the best. Governors are the _last line of defense_ against the chaos coming out of Washington, and I’m committed to holding the line for all Wisconsinites: For the retirees who have to wonder how long their savings will last them. For the young folks anxious about the economy they’re going to inherit. For the families balancing childcare, groceries, healthcare, utilities, and mortgage payments. **[If you’re with me and believe that we should make it easier for folks to make ends meet, please chip in $10, $25, or any amount that is meaningful to you:](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_120725_LastLine_Tier1_D1_S1&t=2&akid=5698%2E196590%2EM9wC5_)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&t=3&akid=5698%2E196590%2EM9wC5_)
---
| [DONATE $27 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=27&t=4&akid=5698%2E196590%2EM9wC5_)
---

| [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6575?t=8&akid=5698%2E196590%2EM9wC5_)
---
Protecting our democracy and tackling corruption is how we lower costs and put power back in the hands of working people.
I’m committed to using the powers of the governor’s office to close loopholes for billionaires – the same ones that our middle-class families are paying for.
When I was Lieutenant Governor alongside Tony Evers, I had a front-row seat to the tools we have at our disposal to tackle the affordability crisis. And I’ll be ready on Day One to deliver. **[If you’re able to donate today, please consider making a contribution to power this campaign.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_120725_LastLine_Tier1_D1_S1&t=9&akid=5698%2E196590%2EM9wC5_)**
Forward,
Mandela Barnes

The end of Lauren Boebert's career.
She raised five times less than us last quarter and is only in Congress because of 546 votes. Last time our campaign faced her, Democrat Trisha Calvarese had the best performance in the district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This holiday season, don't go to Jared. Go to ActBlue.
Because the best gift you can give this holiday season is to Democrat Trisha Calvarese. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. name: James Carville
subject: If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out!

body:
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251207-9807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9807%2E614464%2EUnMmS3)
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251207-9807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9807%2E614464%2EUnMmS3)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251207-9807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9807%2E614464%2EUnMmS3)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251207-9807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9807%2E614464%2EUnMmS3)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98482?refcode=em20251207-9807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9807%2E614464%2EUnMmS3)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1) **!!️THIS JUST IN FROM _NEWSWEEK_ !!️**
[**"Donald Trump Impeachment Chances Surge Amid Epstein Revelations"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70815?t=3&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1) 20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED

[**SIGN OUR PETITION NOW TO TELL CONGRESS TO IMPEACH DONALD TRUMP >>**]() [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70815?t=4&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1)
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70815?t=5&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1)
---
In just under one year back in office, Donald Trump has already:

➞ Gutted Medicare
➞ Tried to destroy Social Security
➞ Repeatedly shredded the Constitution
➞ Torn down the East Wing of the White House
➞ Shut down the Government for the longest time in history
➞ Tried to stage an authoritarian military parade for his birthday
➞ Floated rewriting our founding document to cling to power for a third term

_And that’s just the start, team..._

We refuse to let this chaos continue – but if we’re going to hold Trump accountable, we need Democrats like you to take action.

_Staying silent while he carries out his illegal power grab and dismantles democracy city by city simply isn’t an option._
[**So please, team, be one of the 20,000 Democrats to sign our petition calling on Congress to impeach Donald Trump once and for all >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70815?t=6&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1)
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70815?t=7&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1)
---
Let's do this,

_Fight For Reform_

[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=8&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=9&akid=23702%2E4449941%2EAY2gM1)

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/12bf6073-bbe2-4be0-a929-4a5f3c499c8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
#### Note: Yesterday, Blue Amp Media's own [Melissa Corrigan, she/her](https://open.substack.com/users/13839118-melissa-corrigan-sheher?utm_source=mentions) and [David Shuster](https://open.substack.com/users/16891317-david-shuster?utm_source=mentions) broke news about [Hegseth's #DeleteGate](https://substack.com/redirect/c5f986a6-f85a-430c-83ce-6a1a0926b30a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): secret orders to delete photos and videos of rescued survivors of targeted Venezuelan ships in the illegal strikes in the Caribbean--don't miss it!
* * *
_**By David Shuster**_
One of the saddest jokes of our time is that Arkansas, a state once primarily known for rice, Wal-Mart founders, and the Clintons, has now given our nation a U.S. Senator whose chief distinction is an instinct for the most primitive idea in any room. I am talking, of course, about Republican Tom Cotton. He recently lectured the American people on the virtues of blowing hapless men to kingdom come.
This week, in a classified U.S. military briefing, Cotton joined other Senate and House lawmakers in viewing videos of the September 2nd attacks on an alleged Venezuelan drug boat.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/12bf6073-bbe2-4be0-a929-4a5f3c499c8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Pentagon's first strike killed 9 people on board and capsized the vessel. Two more men, injured and flailing, somehow survived that first strike and clung to the burning hull. The men apparently then had the temerity to try and right the vessel, perhaps because most human beings have an attachment to living. This, in the eyes of Senator Cotton, constituted grounds for their prompt re-atomization.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The U.S. military fired three more missiles, ensuring that the boat's occupants would not inconvenience the Trump administration any further.
Representative Jim Himes (D-CT) the ranking democrat on the House intelligence committee, emerged from the classified briefing and told reporters the "double tap" video was "one of the most troubling things I've ever seen in my public life. You have two individuals in clear distress without any means of locomotion, with a destroyed vessel who were killed by the United States." Himes noted that Pentagon policy and Geneva convention laws forbid the killing of such shipwrecked survivors.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Senator Cotton then strode out of the classified briefing and said the initial boat attack survivors deserved the additional ordnance that shredded them. Why? Because the men had been trying to "flip the boat back over." The sheer audacity. The will to live! Cotton sees this as proof they intended to "stay in the fight," as though the pair were elite commandos assembling a counter assault on the U.S. homeland. Never mind that they were trying to flip over a burning hull more than 1,500 miles away.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is reader-supported.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ijE36BGsEnfngGOloGjgLsVL1e7exf_ChjM-hOjFzsc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180744344)
* * *
Still, listening to Cotton, one envisions the U.S. public trembling at the prospects of a splintered speed boat, soggy contraband, and two men coughing up seawater.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When reporters asked Cotton whether the survivors posed any actual danger, the GOP Senator snapped like a rabid terrier woken up from a nap. "Congressman Himes," he declared, "may be okay with drug boats running to America. I just disagree with that."
This is Tom Cotton's method: reduce every question, no matter how subtle, to the intellectual level of a sloppy bar room brawl between slovenly and mentally challenged drunks. Why address the troubling ethics and illegalities of bombing drowning men when you can instead accuse your critics of siding with the enemy?
Even the U.S. military leaders who briefed Congress sheepishly acknowledged the boat carried no missiles, no explosives, and no plausible path toward any U.S. shore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But because the survivors might have been reaching for radios to possibly try and contact other alleged drug smugglers, Pete Hegseth's Pentagon went full annihilation. According to multiple news reports that have not been disputed, the two men were "blown apart in the water."
Cotton's response? He "didn't see anything disturbing about it." Of course he didn't. A conscience is required for disturbance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What Cotton calls courage is what civilized beings call bloodlust. In Cotton's eternal war against shadows, mirages, and whatever phantoms his staff can scribble onto a briefing note, the GOP Senator finds renewal. One suspects that if Cotton, who served in the U.S. Army decades ago, were to now encounter an actual threat, --a real, breathing, formidable foe--he would faint from the excitement.
In the disgusting world of Donald Trump, Pete Hegseth, and their Congressional sycophants including Tom Cotton, compassion is a weakness, proportionality is a foreign language, and human life is a negligible detail.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some day when a future archaeologist digs up the remains of this once respected Republic, he or she will undoubtedly find among the ruins a MAGA plaque, signed by Trump and Hegseth, honoring Tom Cotton for his gallant stand against a capsized and burned speedboat.
History will also record that Cotton and the other deranged Trumpian psychopaths caused more harm to America than any drug boat ever could.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09e0498e-e97d-4417-bd35-69b72cdcbc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: David Shuster breaks down how MAGA's war-on-phantoms worldview now justifies killing shipwrecked survivors. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? David Shuster breaks down how MAGA's war-on-phantoms worldview now justifies killing shipwrecked survivors. | | and | Dec 7 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Note: Yesterday, Blue Amp Media's own and broke news about : secret orders to delete photos and videos of rescued survivors of targeted Venezuelan ships in the illegal strikes in the Caribbean--don't miss it! By David Shuster One of the saddest jokes of our time is that Arkansas, a state once primarily known for rice, Wal-Mart founders, and the Clintons, has now given our nation a U.S. Senator whose chief distinction is an instinct for the most primitive idea in any room. I am talking, of course, about Republican Tom Cotton. He recently lectured the American people on the virtues of blowing hapless men to kingdom come. This week, in a classified U.S. military briefing, Cotton joined other Senate and House lawmakers in viewing videos of the September 2nd attacks on an alleged Venezuelan drug boat. | | ---|---|--- The Pentagon's first strike killed 9 people on board and capsized the vessel. Two more men, injured and flailing, somehow survived that first strike and clung to the burning hull. The men apparently then had the temerity to try and right the vessel, perhaps because most human beings have an attachment to living. This, in the eyes of Senator Cotton, constituted grounds for their prompt re-atomization. | | ---|---|--- The U.S. military fired three more missiles, ensuring that the boat's occupants would not inconvenience the Trump administration any further. Representative Jim Himes (D-CT) the ranking democrat on the House intelligence committee, emerged from the classified briefing and told reporters the "double tap" video was "one of the most troubling things I've ever seen in my public life. You have two individuals in clear distress without any means of locomotion, with a destroyed vessel who were killed by the United States." Himes noted that Pentagon policy and Geneva convention laws forbid the killing of such shipwrecked survivors. | | ---|---|--- Senator Cotton then strode out of the classified briefing and said the initial boat attack survivors deserved the additional ordnance that shredded them. Why? Because the men had been trying to "flip the boat back over." The sheer audacity. The will to live! Cotton sees this as proof they intended to "stay in the fight," as though the pair were elite commandos assembling a counter assault on the U.S. homeland. Never mind that they were trying to flip over a burning hull more than 1,500 miles away. Blue Amp Media is reader-supported. Still, listening to Cotton, one envisions the U.S. public trembling at the prospects of a splintered speed boat, soggy contraband, and two men coughing up seawater. | | ---|---|--- When reporters asked Cotton whether the survivors posed any actual danger, the GOP Senator snapped like a rabid terrier woken up from a nap. "Congressman Himes," he declared, "may be okay with drug boats running to America. I just disagree with that." This is Tom Cotton's method: reduce every question, no matter how subtle, to the intellectual level of a sloppy bar room brawl between slovenly and mentally challenged drunks. Why address the troubling ethics and illegalities of bombing drowning men when you can instead accuse your critics of siding with the enemy? Even the U.S. military leaders who briefed Congress sheepishly acknowledged the boat carried no missiles, no explosives, and no plausible path toward any U.S. shore. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- But because the survivors might have been reaching for radios to possibly try and contact other alleged drug smugglers, Pete Hegseth's Pentagon went full annihilation. According to multiple news reports that have not been disputed, the two men were "blown apart in the water." Cotton's response? He "didn't see anything disturbing about it." Of course he didn't. A conscience is required for disturbance. | | ---|---|--- What Cotton calls courage is what civilized beings call bloodlust. In Cotton's eternal war against shadows, mirages, and whatever phantoms his staff can scribble onto a briefing note, the GOP Senator finds renewal. One suspects that if Cotton, who served in the U.S. Army decades ago, were to now encounter an actual threat, --a real, breathing, formidable foe--he would faint from the excitement. In the disgusting world of Donald Trump, Pete Hegseth, and their Congressional sycophants including Tom Cotton, compassion is a weakness, proportionality is a foreign language, and human life is a negligible detail. | | ---|---|--- Some day when a future archaeologist digs up the remains of this once respected Republic, he or she will undoubtedly find among the ruins a MAGA plaque, signed by Trump and Hegseth, honoring Tom Cotton for his gallant stand against a capsized and burned speedboat. History will also record that Cotton and the other deranged Trumpian psychopaths caused more harm to America than any drug boat ever could. * | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

body:
I’m coming to you personally to express why I’m all in for Angela.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7e7b39a334e1/i-want-angela-gonzales-torres-to-be-part-of-the-next-winning-cohort-of-justice-democrats-heres-why-8375757?e=1e17b803ba)
