| | | | | |

Hi Friend ,

It’s David Kim here — your neighbor, community advocate, and someone who’s been fighting alongside you for a Los Angeles where every person is treated with dignity and care.
**I want to tell you why I’m proud to support Angela Gonzales-Torres for Congress in Los Angeles’ CA-34 District.**
Angela knows what it means to fight for her family and her people. She’s lived the pain of watching loved ones be deported, of seeing neighbors priced out, and of working people ignored by both parties. _That’s why she’s not afraid to name what’s wrong with our political establishment — or to demand better._
Like me, Angela believes in co-governing with the people. The movement she’s building is rooted in financial freedom, love, and justice — for all of us.
The establishment is bought out by corporate PACs and billionaires. We need leaders like Angela who are grounded in community, unbought, and unafraid to fight for a future where everyone has what they need to thrive at the forefront leading policy.
[**I’m asking you to stand with us. Chip in whatever you can to support Angela’s campaign for a people-powered Congress today. It would mean the world to both me and Angela.**](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=20db45bdec&e=1e17b803ba)

| |

Let’s build the world we deserve, together. Our future will have love and justice at the center.
With much love, David Kim

name: Roy Cooper
subject: liberty and justice for all Americans
body:
Americans have fought for our freedom before. We can do it again.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=124%2E124072%2EWGFK5X)
**I want you to know something about this team, Peter: If you believe some of the things that make America great are liberty, democracy, and acceptance, this campaign is for you.** Extreme Republicans plan to limit people’s rights so only a select few have the power to decide our nation’s future or the freedom to determine how to live. They want to roll back reproductive rights, voting rights, civil rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more because they don’t believe that the lives of all Americans are equally important. And they’re willing to destroy our democracy itself to achieve their aim. **Peter, I still believe that government by and for the people is worth fighting for — and that means fighting for liberty and justice for all Americans.** It means speaking out for people who need a voice. It means defending the people that our federal government has made a mission of attacking. It means securing access to health care, including abortion care. It means reaffirming our commitment to our democratic system of government — a system that is under threat like never before. What’s happening in Washington and from extreme Republicans nationwide is just wrong, Peter. It’s up to us to stop it. **[Give whatever you can if you are with me in the fight.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2241?t=7&akid=124%2E124072%2EWGFK5X)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2241?t=8&akid=124%2E124072%2EWGFK5X)**

Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2242?t=9&akid=124%2E124072%2EWGFK5X)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: Americans have fought for our freedom before. We can do it again. | I want you to know something about this team, Peter: If you believe some of the things that make America great are liberty, democracy, and acceptance, this campaign is for you. Extreme Republicans plan to limit people’s rights so only a select few have the power to decide our nation’s future or the freedom to determine how to live. They want to roll back reproductive rights, voting rights, civil rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more because they don’t believe that the lives of all Americans are equally important. And they’re willing to destroy our democracy itself to achieve their aim. Peter, I still believe that government by and for the people is worth fighting for — and that means fighting for liberty and justice for all Americans. It means speaking out for people who need a voice. It means defending the people that our federal government has made a mission of attacking. It means securing access to health care, including abortion care. It means reaffirming our commitment to our democratic system of government — a system that is under threat like never before. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Something’s weighing on my mind, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into North Carolina to defeat me and our people-first campaign.
This is all weighing on my mind, friend.
I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.
**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.
Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.
**[I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and Michael Bennet today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120811243/587445632/1975801904?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1010-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzczYjM2My1iMGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JroWQuJC_W5r9ZwKZCdReZLNts2jQrZnPYTX8bpacXQ=)**

clean_body: I saved YOU the very last spot on the 2025 MAGA Honor Roll | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for Fellow American do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. name: Tobias Read
subject: Tell President Donald Trump: Hands OFF our democracy
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251207em-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251207em-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
President Trump has crossed the line.
His lawless administration recently deployed federal “monitors” into local elections in California and New Jersey in a blatant attempt to intimidate voters and bully states into surrendering control of their own democratic processes.
And now he’s threatening Oregon, too. As I write this, he’s actively working to abolish vote-by-mail nationwide and claiming that states like ours are merely “agents” of the federal government when it comes to running elections.
That is not how democracy works. That is not how federalism works. And we cannot allow it to stand.
I’m working each and every day to resist this authoritarian power grab, but I need voters — like you — behind me.
So I’m launching a grassroots petition demanding one simple message: President Donald Trump: stay out of state and local elections.
If you believe that states have the constitutional right to run their own elections, vote-by-mail should not be dismantled because of political threats, and that no president has the authority to seize control of state voting systems, then add your name right now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/NrgrO3JQx0qx2yXRXfjF1A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/NrgrO3JQx0qx2yXRXfjF1A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/NrgrO3JQx0qx2yXRXfjF1A2]
This is more than a policy fight — it’s a test.
President Trump is probing for weakness, seeing how far he can push, trying to normalize federal intrusion into areas that have always belonged to the states.
If we don’t push back, the next step will be even more aggressive.
Oregon’s elections are free, fair, and secure. So are California’s. So are New Jersey’s. But we need a wall of public opposition to make sure Donald Trump hears this message clearly: Hands off our elections.
Add your name to the petition today — and help us show that Americans across the country will defend state and local control of voting, no matter who tries to undermine it. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/NrgrO3JQx0qx2yXRXfjF1A2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/NrgrO3JQx0qx2yXRXfjF1A2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251207em-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=TuTCnOhU1Oi8LCm1o7GIFcVod6XcYsNE3KKyu57OAtQizp8TRO8AKrXZeOrDz9B4OvPrCWGIOhsui1U0SS5zFOtkIJ06wkV9ctyhhtGQ8ydbU2fqfIrOglTmrAO3a6prXRMv49n8S%2FuIpG7jkE1C2p3LntdJ%2BnFWc%2FcfATDWdnDDnujtJSK1Q9Ii3iS8PelJGw1kpOPtGP7lHv6ukKBCd%2BKIRhb6O54hoCUOuLUUTeDmh4alM3wvFWmol3FMVDtPZvrxtgRgmHpTNhUq%2FvHmKyQfaa%2Fz77%2FaKuzomJHTDQ7D0jOuar8H9Ro%2F%2FThZcoj2b2u1uQ7SC%2FPxxmeaxG3tyK00ApAYpjAumNrOLJYy3MsEOpj4wCQIInSldmMsipds3UQYEVIJXi7TTc9U6z2Ty1NEkHnuQ3qeVg5hfGe5spr8T7%2FjmaIJZ%2BFv0%2Ff6nb%2BS .

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Here's what I heard from folks like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Not just political talking points. Real concerns from real people.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10106?t=2&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now because I'm ready to ensure my hard work in the U.S. Senate continues to support Michigan's working families.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 27% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10106?t=6&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=1575%2E49239%2EcCNCra)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: ChrisPappas.org
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Let us explain.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3892%2E582294%2E8RVTCC)
We’re writing this message to you to [**ask for just one dollar.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251207_2_one.Diz6-T&refcode=em20251207-2&t=2&akid=3892%2E582294%2E8RVTCC)
That’s right -- four quarters. That may seem like a very small donation, but let us explain.
Our opponent, John Sununu, has the full backing of corporate PACs and right-wing billionaires, and they’re **_“all-in”_** to defeat Chris Pappas and flip New Hampshire blue.
So what can $1 do in the face of all that? When you give $1, and another person gives $1, and another, and another, **it really starts to add up.**
**Dollar by dollar, person by person, we’re building a strong grassroots team that proves that New Hampshire’s Senate seat is not for sale.**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: America is back… we can’t halt this momentum.
body:
Obstructionist Democrats are going nuts. The only thing they have left is to yell at you and intimidate you. Fellow American, if you want people running the country who will give in to that, then vote Democrat next November. |
---
Fellow American,

We've done a great job in Washington this year on behalf of the American people.

**We are winning, the Golden Age is here, and America is BACK.**

But all of our victories have invigorated the Left. They hate to see President Trump and Republicans winning, and they will absolutely do whatever they can to obstruct our conservative agenda, even if it's at the expense of the American people.

Fellow American, that's why these midterm elections are critical to the future of our country.

We must keep the House and Senate to protect the victories we've had since President Trump won.

**It all starts NOW.** We need to get organized and increase our funding to WIN the midterms and stay on track.

clean_body: Obstructionist Democrats are going nuts. The only thing they have left is to yell at you and intimidate you. Fellow American, if you want people running the country who will give in to that, then vote Democrat next November. | Fellow American, We've done a great job in Washington this year on behalf of the American people. We are winning, the Golden Age is here, and America is BACK. But all of our victories have invigorated the Left. They hate to see President Trump and Republicans winning, and they will absolutely do whatever they can to obstruct our conservative agenda, even if it's at the expense of the American people. Fellow American, that's why these midterm elections are critical to the future of our country. We must keep the House and Senate to protect the victories we've had since President Trump won. It all starts NOW. We need to get organized and increase our funding to WIN the midterms and stay on track. | Obstructionist Democrats are going nuts. The only thing they have left is to yell at you and intimidate you. Fellow American, if you want people running the country who will give in to that, then vote Democrat next November. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: I need you now, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
clean_body: I'll be honest, Peter, whenever I see an American flag flying high, it hits me like a freight train. It takes me back to every flag I saluted as a Navy SEAL Commander, and every brother I watched bleed so our kids could stand free. But freedom only lives if WE defend it NOW, right here at home. You know this land better than any politician in D.C. You know which neighbors stand firm and which ones sell out. You know exactly what your kids will lose if we let these radicals buy us out ranch by ranch. Because while we wave our flags, the same radicals who spit on our flag are moving in, buying up ranches, choking our oil, muzzling our churches, and flooding America with woke politics we never asked for. This will not happen on my watch, but I won't swing blind, I need your voice to tell me exactly where to hit first. Peter, you know this land. You know who you can trust. And you know exactly what your kids stand to lose if we back down. \. Should we guard our borders and oil like those that came before us?\. Should we slam the gate on D.C. elites trying to flip us blue?, this isn't a survey. It's YOUR orders to me. As Americans, we've never run from a fight. And we won't start now. you for your input. Americans like you guide me in D.C., and I couldn't do it without you. God Bless,Ryan Zinke| | Paid for by Zinke for Congress Ryan Zinke is a retired member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. 704C East 13th Street Suite 260 Whitefish, MT 59937 To unsubscribe from Zinke for Congress, |

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Making sure you saw →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter -
I just wanted to make sure you saw the big news our team shared yesterday. This is an important moment for our campaign, and I don’t want you to miss it.
EMILYs List has endorsed our campaign for Attorney General!
This endorsement means a lot — but what will matter even more is whether we can turn this moment into real grassroots strength. If you can, please take a moment to chip in today. Your support right now shows just how strong this campaign truly is. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251207-email]
Forwarding the announcement below!
– Jena
----- Original Email -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251207-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251207-email]
Peter –
We’re thrilled to share some big news: EMILYs List has officially endorsed Jena for Attorney General.
EMILYs List is one of the nation’s most powerful organizations supporting pro-choice Democratic women, and their endorsement is a major vote of confidence in the work we’re doing together.
They know that Colorado needs an Attorney General who will:
➡️ Protect reproductive freedom
➡️ Defend our democracy
➡️ Stand up to extremism
As Secretary of State, Jena never backed down from fights that mattered: defending elections, expanding voting access, and protecting Coloradans’ fundamental rights. As Attorney General, she’ll carry that same courage and commitment into the next chapter.
But here’s the truth: this campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. To make the most of this major endorsement, we need to show the strength of our movement today. Will you chip in to help us build the momentum this endorsement brings? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251207-email]
Every donation helps us reach more voters, fight back against right-wing attacks, and run the strongest campaign possible.
Thank you for being part of this campaign and for believing in what we can accomplish together.
– Team Griswold

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: “We’re killing all the right people” –- Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120811704/587447284/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.07_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0NzgxNy1iN2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iu7s7JZ2X47ISvlPw96Ysm_UlW1GrBy3bNvS-9RyXbk=) Lindsey Graham stood on stage and **_bragged about “killing all the right people.”_**

Who exactly are the “ _right people_ ,” Lindsey?

The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance?

As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care.

So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate.

**Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. It should be about enriching lives, not glorifying death.**

[**_But to replace Lindsey Graham and restore decency to South Carolina’s Senate seat, I need your help. Will you split a $10 donation or whatever you can between my campaign and Maggie Hassan right now to help us fight back against this cruelty and elect a Senator who actually values human life?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120811705/587447285/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.07_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0NzgxNy1iN2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iu7s7JZ2X47ISvlPw96Ysm_UlW1GrBy3bNvS-9RyXbk=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120811706/587447286/899181852?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.07_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA0NzgxNy1iN2QzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iu7s7JZ2X47ISvlPw96Ysm_UlW1GrBy3bNvS-9RyXbk=)

clean_body: = Lindsey Graham stood on stage and bragged about “killing all the right people.” Who exactly are the “ right people ,” Lindsey? The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance? As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care. So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate. Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. # [District Round‐up 12.07.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F12%2F07%2Fdistrict-round-up-12-07-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=1dde889ab2f7beaee0951d03ef0edc16&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on December 7, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3cdfddeb5d165a62c9b550640007da0fe872a6fcc9fd354bc4514d250be4ef1c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=574f3e86e81b4694260d3cc74fa2f6eb&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857)
Considering the free-wheeling raids of our personal information at various US Departments and Agencies earlier this year by Elon Musk and his DOGE bros, this USDA [](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2c49cafe5456e9bbd7250c22c6e4035c85638cf377d7838d3baa73eb6b985b90&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2bab93b25f3f6d4e0e3655de3ba9a6a5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857)demand of SNAP beneficiary info seems redundant, but maybe Musk and company simply kept the pilfered information for themselves.
"The agriculture department is seeking personal information like Social Security numbers, birth dates, and home addresses—information it claims will aid officials in rooting out fraud. Democratic leaders have warned the data could be used for other policies not related to keeping people fed, like immigration enforcement."
Nonetheless, the Trump administration's USDA is threatening to withhold SNAP benefits for hungry Pennsylvanians unless Governor Shapiro betrays 2 million Pennsylvanians.
Not only is Trump's USDA threatening to withhold SNAP funding from Pennsylvania, but his administration is also threatening to withhold SNAP funding from 19 other states that have Democratic leaders who refuse to give up the beneficiary info.
The Trump administration has no right to this information and can't be trusted not to use whatever they would receive for nefarious purposes.
Naturally, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, says nothing about this looming disaster because he chose to remove SNAP benefits from over six thousand of his own constituents based on no proof of fraud from specific beneficiaries when he voted for the One Big Beautiful Bill Act...twice.
It's as if Joyce can't force Pennsylvanians into starvation fast enough.
Vote this evil clown out of office next November and vote for me, Beth Farnham, to represent Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District because not only do I [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=106533472fc5207ef3b5d46627f8752d0df9b9ddb9e7dd11acb836edfa764870&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=e7722b51b5e47ddbe70d4ba3c0222c72&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857), I choose the health, safety, and privacy of Everyday Americans.
What a beautiful and festive evening for the annual Cocoa Crawl in charming downtown Chambersburg on Friday!
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2c49cafe5456e9bbd7250c22c6e4035c85638cf377d7838d3baa73eb6b985b90&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2bab93b25f3f6d4e0e3655de3ba9a6a5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857)In addition to enjoying warm cocoa, I met many small business owners.
I let them know that I care about them and their businesses.
That means I'm fighting for affordable healthcare and reduced tariffs.
Please elect me to US Congress next November because when you choose Beth Farnham, you [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=48747c7ace4108065186a54bf26c78573646c8045a96d3f90c0c168acad46efb&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6afde0b33f5cb5e5809ef199a3538088&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857), you choose the heartbeat of small town America
(PS. While I endorsed their businesses, it does not mean they necessarily endorse me as a candidate, but in the spirit of community, we stood together.)
Whether you're choosing your favorite candidate or gingerbread house, voting is a sacred American institution.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2c49cafe5456e9bbd7250c22c6e4035c85638cf377d7838d3baa73eb6b985b90&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2bab93b25f3f6d4e0e3655de3ba9a6a5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857)Yet, for so many, the ability to exercise one's voting rights has been significantly curtailed.
"There have been 33 new laws in 19 states since the 2020 election that restrict voter access, Demissie said. For example, Texas has instituted laws to require voter ID, reduce the number of polling places and hours available to vote, reduce early voting opportunities, conduct voter purges and require signature matching." - [American Bar Association Webinar on Voting Rights Article](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=97d048b37d67a41060b9a6dd9eecb8e65a66a6b731402b0d41ef2fbcb5e3d2d7&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7c1b219f6eaf3b14c36c4ce72881e161&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857)
In a free and fair Democracy, voting is a "shall have", not a "may have".
That's why I'll be fighting for more free and fair access to voting through federal legislation that promotes expanded access for US citizens to polling places, early voting, and more mail in ballot availability.
Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, next November because I not only [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8716a9c9ae9b90fe1cbfc258691ae6b59da3c9190c98d6dfcfcf44e7d7740327&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5660&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=57273a53d454854de5e15989199500bd&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=c43027180c0936883566fffa3f13a857), I'll vote FOR YOU !
PS Vote for your favorite gingerbread house at the Adams County Arts Council if you get a chance to visit Gettysburg!
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

clean_body: | Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-cros... | or | | | or ---|---|--- | By Elizabeth Farnham on December 7, 2025 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: Considering the free-wheeling raids of our personal information at various US Departments and Agencies earlier this year by Elon Musk and his DOGE bros, this USDA of SNAP beneficiary info seems redundant, but maybe Musk and company simply kept the pilfered information for themselves. "The agriculture department is seeking personal information like Social Security numbers, birth dates, and home addresses—information it claims will aid officials in rooting out fraud. Democratic leaders have warned the data could be used for other policies not related to keeping people fed, like immigration enforcement." Nonetheless, the Trump administration's USDA is threatening to withhold SNAP benefits for hungry Pennsylvanians unless Governor Shapiro betrays 2 million Pennsylvanians. Not only is Trump's USDA threatening to withhold SNAP funding from Pennsylvania, but his administration is also threatening to withhold SNAP funding from 19 other states that have Democratic leaders who refuse to give up the beneficiary info. The Trump administration has no right to this information and can't be trusted not to use whatever they would receive for nefarious purposes. Naturally, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, says nothing about this looming disaster because he chose to remove SNAP benefits from over six thousand of his own constituents based on no proof of fraud from specific beneficiaries when he voted for the One Big Beautiful Bill Act...twice. It's as if Joyce can't force Pennsylvanians into starvation fast enough. Vote this evil clown out of office next November and vote for me, Beth Farnham, to represent Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District because not only do I , I choose the health, safety, and privacy of Everyday Americans. What a beautiful and festive evening for the annual Cocoa Crawl in charming downtown Chambersburg on Friday! addition to enjoying warm cocoa, I met many small business owners. I let them know that I care about them and their businesses. That means I'm fighting for affordable healthcare and reduced tariffs. Please elect me to US Congress next November because when you choose Beth Farnham, you , you choose the heartbeat of small town America (PS. While I endorsed their businesses, it does not mean they necessarily endorse me as a candidate, but in the spirit of community, we stood together.) Whether you're choosing your favorite candidate or gingerbread house, voting is a sacred American institution. , for so many, the ability to exercise one's voting rights has been significantly curtailed. "There have been 33 new laws in 19 states since the 2020 election that restrict voter access, Demissie said. For example, Texas has instituted laws to require voter ID, reduce the number of polling places and hours available to vote, reduce early voting opportunities, conduct voter purges and require signature matching." - In a free and fair Democracy, voting is a "shall have", not a "may have". That's why I'll be fighting for more free and fair access to voting through federal legislation that promotes expanded access for US citizens to polling places, early voting, and more mail in ballot availability. Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, next November because I not only , I'll vote FOR YOU ! PS Vote for your favorite gingerbread house at the Adams County Arts Council if you get a chance to visit Gettysburg! If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

name: Claire Low, All On The Line
subject: Missourians won’t be silenced
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need your support in this fight for fair maps
|
---

Peter,
The people of Missouri won’t be silenced.
As you read this, voters are attempting to use the state’s referendum process to overturn the gerrymander that was recently passed by the Republican-controlled legislature. **But map manipulators are doing everything in their power to prevent the will of the people from prevailing.**
First, they tried to reject the referendum effort outright — an illegal attempt to silence the voice of the people. Then, once the petition was allowed to proceed, they refused to count the 100,000 citizen signatures that had already been collected. Now, they want to target and confuse voters with deceptive referendum language that claims their gerrymandered map “better reflects statewide voting patterns.”
**Anti-democracy extremists want to mislead voters into rejecting a ballot initiative that would veto the state’s unfair electoral map. We can’t let that happen.**
**Look: The opponents of this citizen-led effort are well-funded and well-organized. We need to come together to make sure that Missouri voters aren't fooled by their lies.**
[**Make a donation right now to help ensure we can continue exposing these attacks and keep protecting fair representation in Missouri and nationwide.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120811989/587448379/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MissouriSilenced_email_20251207-AOTL-Tier1-MissouriSilenced_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251207-AOTL-Tier1-MissouriSilenced_&utm_campaign=MissouriSilenced&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5ZTA4MjEzLWI4ZDMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=59Rit6U0e2Qz8cUBc61wmHFUOKXIxK1U31SYu3yPDGQ=)

clean_body: We need your support in this fight for fair maps | Peter, The people of Missouri won’t be silenced. As you read this, voters are attempting to use the state’s referendum process to overturn the gerrymander that was recently passed by the Republican-controlled legislature. But map manipulators are doing everything in their power to prevent the will of the people from prevailing. First, they tried to reject the referendum effort outright — an illegal attempt to silence the voice of the people. Then, once the petition was allowed to proceed, they refused to count the 100,000 citizen signatures that had already been collected. Now, they want to target and confuse voters with deceptive referendum language that claims their gerrymandered map “better reflects statewide voting patterns.” Anti-democracy extremists want to mislead voters into rejecting a ballot initiative that would veto the state’s unfair electoral map. We can’t let that happen. Look: The opponents of this citizen-led effort are well-funded and well-organized. We need to come together to make sure that Missouri voters aren't fooled by their lies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: George Whitesides
subject: This requires an immediate investigation.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120812064/587448596/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZhYTc0ZS1iOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IMrpKlEZwbXyResT9boqQX-S8AnqjPi3OzgQscTOKy8=)
We can’t allow this to fly under the radar, Peter.

Trump’s Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is under fire for overseeing boat strikes in international waters against alleged drug boats that killed nearly a dozen people.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120812065/587448599/-540019242?refcode=em-12.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZhYTc0ZS1iOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IMrpKlEZwbXyResT9boqQX-S8AnqjPi3OzgQscTOKy8=&emci=e99ca348-b8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=64faa74e-b8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=36198509)
This was carried out without Congressional approval or a sliver of transparency. That’s unacceptable and illegal. Our armed forces should be led with a steady hand -- not recklessness and a disregard for our Constitution.

As a member of the Armed Services Committee, it’s especially critical that we get to the bottom of what happened. If Hegseth ordered these strikes, it could amount to war crimes.

**[The American people deserve accountability -- and this Administration is not providing it. That’s why I’m calling for an immediate investigation into Hegseth. If you’re with me, sign onto my petition today to help apply the pressure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120812066/587448601/-540019242?refcode=em-12.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZhYTc0ZS1iOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IMrpKlEZwbXyResT9boqQX-S8AnqjPi3OzgQscTOKy8=&emci=e99ca348-b8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=64faa74e-b8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=36198509)**

George

name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Do you approve of the performance of Pam Bondi as Attorney General?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: Attorney General Pam Bondi has been in office nearly a year, and we want to know how voters feel about her job performance.
Bondi has a long history covering up for Donald Trump. As Florida's AG, she examined allegations against Trump University, but then suddenly stopped the nascent investigation after Donald Trump made a $25,000 donation to her campaign fund. After Bondi ended her term as Florida AG, she became one of Trump's chief election deniers, spreading the false claim that the 2020 election had been stolen and refusing to answer direct questions about who won the 2020 election, more than four years after the fact.
Bondi has called for labeling people who commit vandalism against a private company (Tesla) as "domestic terrorists". Bondi was allegedly suppressing the Epstein files and negotiating with convicted Epstein accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell for a supposed immunity deal, with allegations that Bondi is trying to cover up Trump's alleged involvement with Epstein's underage sex ring.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about her job performance. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you approve of the job Pam Bondi is doing as AG?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120725_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120725_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120725_1&amount=20]

subject: Rep. Chip Roy is demanding Congress protect the U.S. Constitution from Sharia.

body:

---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: RAISING healthcare costs, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House, defeat the MAGA majority, and put a HUGE check on Trump!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98130?t=9&akid=22138%2E878179%2EF34rNq) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98130?t=10&akid=22138%2E878179%2EF34rNq) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98130?t=11&akid=22138%2E878179%2EF34rNq)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22138%2E878179%2EF34rNq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22138%2E878179%2EF34rNq).**

clean_body: Sign now: Demand the FULL Epstein files — no more hiding. = The American people deserve the FULL Epstein files. Not the redactions. Not the parts Republicans cherry-pick. My team and I spent six days combing through over 20,000 documents, and the emails we uncovered raised serious, serious questions about Donald Trump’s relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. So what happened? We released the emails. Republicans erupted. Trumpworld panicked. And suddenly — magically — they decided they did want to release the files they fought for years to bury. Here’s why: They only move when we force them to. It’s not because they care about survivors or justice. It’s because they fear public pressure. So let's give them more of it. This isn’t about partisanship. It’s about transparency and refusing to let powerful men hide behind power structures ever again. Republicans call my approach “sensational.” They say I’m doing this for attention. They say I “should stick to TikTok.” You know what I say? When the people in charge refuse to tell the truth, it’s our job to force it out of them. Add your name. Stand with survivors. Demand the truth. name: JoAnna Mendoza (via Emily Randall for Congress)
subject: screw Pete Hegseth’s “standards”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
If Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026...

| _I wanted to make sure you saw this message from JoAnna Mendoza: Mom, retired Marine Corps Drill Instructor, and Democratic candidate running in our adopted swing district, Arizona’s 6th! –Emily_
* * *
Peter, this really pisses me off. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120812833/587451336/989746443?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.12.07_MendozaHegseth_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWNmNTg2ZS1jMWQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yhVN1zy8F0EOLUKs6_WwXbt0vF1_2UI5_uqVqtjm7aE=) **Instead of trying to deliver for our troops and veterans during this government shutdown, Pete Hegseth is using our troops as props for their latest culture war. ** He says he wants troops to meet the “highest male standard”, but that’s B.S. I met the standard while I was serving three tours in two warzones, and when I became a U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor. And I exceeded that standard when I was chosen as one of only two women to train other Drill Instructors at Drill Instructor school. **So if Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026...** All eyes have already been on my race for one of the most flippable red seats in the country, but being so outspoken against this administration makes me an even bigger priority for national Republicans to defeat. clean_body: If Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026... | I wanted to make sure you saw this message from JoAnna Mendoza: Mom, retired Marine Corps Drill Instructor, and Democratic candidate running in our adopted swing district, Arizona’s 6th! –Emily Peter, this really pisses me off. = Instead of trying to deliver for our troops and veterans during this government shutdown, Pete Hegseth is using our troops as props for their latest culture war. He says he wants troops to meet the “highest male standard”, but that’s B.S. I met the standard while I was serving three tours in two warzones, and when I became a U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor. And I exceeded that standard when I was chosen as one of only two women to train other Drill Instructors at Drill Instructor school. So if Pete has a problem with women serving our country, then just wait until he finds out that Democratic women veterans will be the ones who flip the House blue come 2026... All eyes have already been on my race for one of the most flippable red seats in the country, but being so outspoken against this administration makes me an even bigger priority for national Republicans to defeat. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Now that the deadline has expired…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Here is the situation I’m caught in:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17806891/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvaHFqaHZkTmFVdw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDc/LbmNsYmdCU2FFag/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTN0thc1lXOGFscw/gaTYTZA/sdr7071d517)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

| | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves.

Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: **_Colorado SHOULD still be a_**** _red_**** _state._** Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, **but because leadership failed them.**_And that failure matters far beyond our borders._ Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. **If we stop that tide**** _here_****, we stop it from sweeping across America.**
---

This is our chance to send that message. This is our chance to restore a state that should never have been lost.And this is the moment every patriot -- in Colorado and across America -- should care about. If you're just learning about me today, I hope it's the beginning of something bigger. Because this movement isn't powered by mega-donors or coastal elites -- _**[it’s powered by people who are ready to take our state and country back.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e40efe2f8ce41b5a739c10b5b1e1efd&_e=t8sBrm2IrE4uiJQttxE3h4DrUAyXQBhmdbAcon9z4ZRKKLY0jLAEgGZKZlhOBi5eDROrbqC4jU6T7kHfgUs67LYLLJw7fbBEQ0oIuOvNbJFSy_VrjeZsWj56c9wQIQaPqf-kHwSrtiopr2MlgHfOpp5KJCIuJsK3lZ-_-6vWu84HUsOYimxlX9qsKl5leQkbCv1M0vtZI1vvR-tQkyhIeo1XqxiuWLyxW_hQr8YAQowRi4n0bYOERUEA83z8fEIL3GmODlj0G397Iio1tx_0yyOOomOhsTet0hGnC2nD7qKYJrLd5xvIYXysTexuIrCMJC90sS3nj1tlAGjDAiqjUANPwsdEq8HuQlxFYIzO_FficmiN7MTuJzuo7gPBFtJSuFan3zYc4nVP4tw5J0YbHQ5KYodICXDFmGP3G8ULkrPVcsfaiffvo7UOboPaCul6dDh12TGqcskbOhwpWbAr6V4_7uNy1zwz83ZH4FBAmLG-QeQAisVmLr6RNOie_zsVZ2YRCmSBEVUXaFj20rYGA7p2B00kOCY1X6Z0s4hgkucFtYrH1ziZDHB9g5h5TFRdJkRIOEy9wGet2J2qWMg6eUS51VKqsFZKN3ZiLEZCNwU%3D)**_ Thank you for standing with me!

clean_body: The nation is watching this A state built on faith, family, freedom, and the Second Amendment is being tested -- and its future will shape the country. | | | | | Friend, | | If this is the first time you're hearing from me, let me introduce myself. My name is Victor Marx -- a husband, father, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and founder of an international humanitarian organization that has carried out more than 150 high-risk rescue missions around the world.I've spent my life stepping into the chaos most people run from, fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. I never expected to run for Governor of Colorado... But people I respected deeply -- including Charlie and Erika Kirk -- believed in me and urged me to step forward because they saw what was happening here in our state.After Charlie was killed, Erika reminded me that he believed this was a fight I was meant to take on.They were right, and I am now fully committed to winning this fight. Because here's the truth most people outside our state don't realize: Colorado SHOULD still be a red state. Colorado was built on independence, limited government, faith, family, and the unshakeable belief in the Second Amendment. Those values run deep in our history and in our people.But over time, the political establishment and a flood of left-wing ideas have overpowered the very values that made Colorado strong. We've watched our state shift from red, to purple, to blue -- not because the people changed, but because leadership failed them.And that failure matters far beyond our borders. Colorado has become a testing ground for policies that spread nationwide -- soft-on-crime agendas, government overreach, attacks on faith, restrictions on constitutional freedoms. If we stop that tide here, we stop it from sweeping across America. That's why this race is so important. If Colorado flips back, the entire country will feel it. It will prove that conservative, constitutional values aren't fading -- they 're rising again! Our state and country has too many politicians , so instead, I'm asking you to stand with ME - a Marine, pastor, humanitarian, and Patriot - to ensure we have leaders who will fight to uphold and protect our values and freedoms. This is our chance to send that message. This is our chance to restore a state that should never have been lost.And this is the moment every patriot -- in Colorado and across America -- should care about. If you're just learning about me today, I hope it's the beginning of something bigger. Because this movement isn't powered by mega-donors or coastal elites -- Thank you for standing with me! For Colorado. For America. Victor Marx Conservative for Governor of Colorado | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

# [Somalis Assimilating as Americans Very Rapidly](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=180994531&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTk0NTMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjUxNTE2NzksImV4cCI6MTc2Nzc0MzY3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.7Wb8DFdcjIlxqJ1kCVBK5XumWhqUtUjoLIHEiesGFSk)
### Ripping Off Taxpayers is as American as Apple Pie
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Dec 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=180994531&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTk0NTMxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTE1MTY3OSwiZXhwIjoxNzY3NzQzNjc5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.nur41CM1JbemLTxVMCJGMf6ssvkj6xfVAqifhf2Ji94&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/somalis-assimilating-as-americans?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

December 7, 2025
President Trump is outraged. On hearing of Medicaid fraud perpetrated by Somalis in Minnesota, [he stated:](https://substack.com/redirect/cf74b248-5885-4784-b3aa-095323909247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Somalis ripped off that state for billions of dollars. They contribute nothing. I don't want them in my country. Their country is no good for a reason. Their country stinks."
The President is being a bit harsh. He is implying that Somalis are not assimilating because they are ripping off Medicaid and the taxpayers. He has it backwards. The Somalis are learning to play the game with amazing rapidity. They are not quite at the level of the Wall Street Welfare State led by Goldman Sachs and Citibank, who ripped off the taxpayers for over a trillion, but maybe after a generation or two, the Somalis will be partying in the Hamptons at taxpayer expense too.
First a little background. [Somalia](https://substack.com/redirect/0589b716-d44d-4655-a4f3-a1ff8090eeb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is located on the east coast of Africa, adjacent to Ethiopia and Kenya, and is one of poorest countries on the planet. The area was once a powerful empire during the Middle Ages and a center of trade but was colonized by both Italy and Great Britian. It became an independent country in 1960, but like many decolonized African countries, tribal borders were not respected resulting in internecine civil wars and massive political instability.
To escape, some Somalis [made their way](https://substack.com/redirect/cece65c8-39a2-464a-a397-f015a4b3b7c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the United States and while estimates vary, approximately 260,000 live here and most are citizens. As Minnesota is a welcoming state for new immigrants, about 100,000 Somalis migrated there, most concentrated in the Minneapolis.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b72acf19-504a-41d0-8185-f37a2189a114?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Minnesota Congresswomen Ilhan Omar Who is of Somali Background

Many are on public assistance, but some entrepreneurial Somalis figured out how to [game the system](https://substack.com/redirect/54880a16-aa78-4f1d-9e84-8bd3da23be06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They established organizations such as Feeding Our Future, in which they swiped random names off a web site and claimed to be feeding them. But they just used the money to buy real estate and luxury vehicles. Another group called Smart Therapy pretended to help autistic children and actually gave families with healthy children pretending to be autistic $1,500 for enrolling in "therapy" sessions. And some families even demanded higher kickbacks!

These scams were well known but when government officials started to investigate, the fast-learning Somalis screamed racism, and that was the end of the investigations.

But President Trump is not pleased. He has called Somalis "garbage." But instead, he should be hiring them.

For example, many Trump supporters are upset with President Trump because they purchased his stock [DJT](https://substack.com/redirect/a71334e9-d65d-47be-8f6a-45b2107a1ca9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Trump Media & Technology Group) along with the Trump bitcoin [$TRUMP.](https://substack.com/redirect/163cff08-7ae5-4b3b-b945-36a2058e7f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) DJT traded at $62 a share when President Trump was reelected in 2024 and now is at $11. It has a market cap of $3 billion, loses 59 cents a share and is on its way to 0.

$TRUMP bitcoin was at $45 at his inauguration and now trades at $5.80. It is on its way to zero too.

But who better than a Somali to take over DJT and $TRUMP and talk MAGA fans into buying more? And President Trump should not stop there. According to published reports, the smart money is that President Trump will choose either the Director of the National Economic Council, Kevin Hassert, or Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessent, as the next Chairman of the Federal Reserve.

This is ridiculous. Our country is over $38 trillion dollars in debt. We do not need another incompetent boring white male to perpetrate the same policies. We need a Somali.

A Somali would immediately issue trillions in dollars in bonds, sell them to the naive Russians, Iranians and Chinese, default and Viola! - no more debt.

And how long before we see a Somali at the head of Goldman Sachs? The headhunters will tire of hiring dunderhead Harvard MBAs whose most imaginative scam is selling collaterized mortgages to brainless insurance company executives. A Somali will create bonds backing companies that will make gold out of saltwater. Alchemy will be huge once again.

Of course, the Goldman Sachs executives and President Trump will have to develop a taste for the Somali dish Makaq, camel meat stew. But it will be a small tradeoff for the profits produced by this latest addition to the American melting pot.
